authors_text: Yuansheng Hua,Lichao Moua,Jianzhe Lin,Konrad Heidler,Xiao Xiang Zhu
title: Aerial Scene Understanding in The Wild: Multi-Scene Recognition via Prototype-based Memory Networks
title_zh: 野外空中场景理解：通过基于原型的记忆网络进行多场景识别
abstract: Aerial scene recognition is a fundamental visual task and has attracted an increasing research interest in the last few years. Most of current researches mainly deploy efforts to categorize an aerial image into one scene-level label, while in real-world scenarios, there often exist multiple scenes in a single image. Therefore, in this paper, we propose to take a step forward to a more practical and challenging task, namely multi-scene recognition in single images. Moreover, we note that manually yielding annotations for such a task is extraordinarily time- and labor-consuming. To address this, we propose a prototype-based memory network to recognize multiple scenes in a single image by leveraging massive well-annotated single-scene images. The proposed network consists of three key components: 1) a prototype learning module, 2) a prototype-inhabiting external memory, and 3) a multi-head attention-based memory retrieval module. To be more specific, we first learn the prototype representation of each aerial scene from single-scene aerial image datasets and store it in an external memory. Afterwards, a multi-head attention-based memory retrieval module is devised to retrieve scene prototypes relevant to query multi-scene images for final predictions. Notably, only a limited number of annotated multi-scene images are needed in the training phase. To facilitate the progress of aerial scene recognition, we produce a new multi-scene aerial image (MAI) dataset. Experimental results on variant dataset configurations demonstrate the effectiveness of our network. Our dataset and codes are publicly available.
summary: Aerial scene recognition is a fundamental visual task and has attracted an increasing research interest in the last few years. Most of current researches mainly deploy efforts to categorize an aerial image into one scene-level label, while in real-world scenarios, there often exist multiple scenes in a single image. Therefore, in this paper, we propose to take a step forward to a more practical and challenging task, namely multi-scene recognition in single images. Moreover, we note that manually yielding annotations for such a task is extraordinarily time- and labor-consuming. To address this, we propose a prototype-based memory network to recognize multiple scenes in a single image by leveraging massive well-annotated single-scene images. The proposed network consists of three key components: 1) a prototype learning module, 2) a prototype-inhabiting external memory, and 3) a multi-head attention-based memory retrieval module. To be more specific, we first learn the prototype representation of each aerial scene from single-scene aerial image datasets and store it in an external memory. Afterwards, a multi-head attention-based memory retrieval module is devised to retrieve scene prototypes relevant to query multi-scene images for final predictions. Notably, only a limited number of annotated multi-scene images are needed in the training phase. To facilitate the progress of aerial scene recognition, we produce a new multi-scene aerial image (MAI) dataset. Experimental results on variant dataset configurations demonstrate the effectiveness of our network. Our dataset and codes are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 空中场景识别是一项基本的视觉任务，在过去几年中引起了越来越多的研究兴趣。目前大多数研究主要致力于将航空图像分类为一个场景级标签，而在现实场景中，一张图像中通常存在多个场景。因此，在本文中，我们建议向更实际和更具挑战性的任务迈出一步，即单图像中的多场景识别。此外，我们注意到，为此类任务手动生成注释非常耗时和费力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于原型的内存网络，通过利用大量注释良好的单场景图像来识别单个图像中的多个场景。所提出的网络由三个关键组件组成：1）原型学习模块，2）原型驻留外部存储器，3）基于多头注意的记忆检索模块。更具体地说，我们首先从单场景航空图像数据集中学习每个航空场景的原型表示并将其存储在外部存储器中。之后，设计了一个基于多头注意的记忆检索模块来检索与查询多场景图像相关的场景原型以进行最终预测。值得注意的是，在训练阶段只需要有限数量的带注释的多场景图像。为了促进航空场景识别的进展，我们生成了一个新的多场景航空图像（MAI）数据集。变体数据集配置的实验结果证明了我们网络的有效性。我们的数据集和代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于原型记忆网络的多场景识别方法，用于处理单张航拍图像中包含多个场景的识别任务。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要针对单场景分类，但实际场景中单张图像常包含多个场景，且多场景标注耗时耗力。因此需要一种无需大量标注数据的多场景识别方法。
AI.method: 设计包含原型学习模块、原型存储的外部记忆模块和多头注意力记忆检索模块的网络。利用单场景图像学习原型表示并存储于外部记忆，通过多头注意力机制检索与查询图像相关的场景原型进行预测。
AI.result: 在多种数据集配置下验证了方法的有效性，并发布了新的多场景航拍图像数据集（MAI），代码和数据集已公开。
AI.conclusion: 提出的原型记忆网络有效解决了多场景识别问题，为航拍场景理解提供了新方法和数据支持。

authors_text: Taein Kwon,Bugra Tekin,Jan Stuhmer,Federica Bogo,Marc Pollefeys
title: H2O: Two Hands Manipulating Objects for First Person Interaction Recognition
title_zh: H2O：两只手操纵物体进行第一人称交互识别
abstract: We present a comprehensive framework for egocentric interaction recognition using markerless 3D annotations of two hands manipulating objects. To this end, we propose a method to create a unified dataset for egocentric 3D interaction recognition. Our method produces annotations of the 3D pose of two hands and the 6D pose of the manipulated objects, along with their interaction labels for each frame. Our dataset, called H2O (2 Hands and Objects), provides synchronized multi-view RGB-D images, interaction labels, object classes, ground-truth 3D poses for left & right hands, 6D object poses, ground-truth camera poses, object meshes and scene point clouds. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first benchmark that enables the study of first-person actions with the use of the pose of both left and right hands manipulating objects and presents an unprecedented level of detail for egocentric 3D interaction recognition. We further propose the method to predict interaction classes by estimating the 3D pose of two hands and the 6D pose of the manipulated objects, jointly from RGB images. Our method models both inter- and intra-dependencies between both hands and objects by learning the topology of a graph convolutional network that predicts interactions. We show that our method facilitated by this dataset establishes a strong baseline for joint hand-object pose estimation and achieves state-of-the-art accuracy for first person interaction recognition.
summary: We present a comprehensive framework for egocentric interaction recognition using markerless 3D annotations of two hands manipulating objects. To this end, we propose a method to create a unified dataset for egocentric 3D interaction recognition. Our method produces annotations of the 3D pose of two hands and the 6D pose of the manipulated objects, along with their interaction labels for each frame. Our dataset, called H2O (2 Hands and Objects), provides synchronized multi-view RGB-D images, interaction labels, object classes, ground-truth 3D poses for left & right hands, 6D object poses, ground-truth camera poses, object meshes and scene point clouds. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first benchmark that enables the study of first-person actions with the use of the pose of both left and right hands manipulating objects and presents an unprecedented level of detail for egocentric 3D interaction recognition. We further propose the method to predict interaction classes by estimating the 3D pose of two hands and the 6D pose of the manipulated objects, jointly from RGB images. Our method models both inter- and intra-dependencies between both hands and objects by learning the topology of a graph convolutional network that predicts interactions. We show that our method facilitated by this dataset establishes a strong baseline for joint hand-object pose estimation and achieves state-of-the-art accuracy for first person interaction recognition.
abstract_zh: 我们使用两只手操作物体的无标记 3D 注释，提出了一个以自我为中心的交互识别的综合框架。为此，我们提出了一种为以自我为中心的 3D 交互识别创建统一数据集的方法。我们的方法生成两只手的 3D 姿势和被操纵对象的 6D 姿势的注释，以及它们每帧的交互标签。我们的数据集称为 H2O（2 Hands and Objects），提供同步多视图 RGB-D 图像、交互标签、对象类、左手和右手的真实 3D 姿势、6D 对象姿势、真实相机姿势、对象网格和场景点云。据我们所知，这是第一个基准，能够通过使用左右手操纵物体的姿势来研究第一人称动作，并为以自我为中心的 3D 交互识别提供前所未有的细节水平。我们进一步提出了通过从 RGB 图像联合估计两只手的 3D 姿势和操作对象的 6D 姿势来预测交互类别的方法。我们的方法通过学习预测交互的图卷积网络的拓扑来对双手和物体之间的相互依赖和内部依赖进行建模。我们表明，该数据集促进的方法为联合手部物体姿势估计建立了强大的基线，并实现了第一人称交互识别的最先进的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为H2O的框架和数据集，用于通过双手与物体的三维标注实现第一视角交互识别。
AI.motivation: 现有第一视角交互识别方法缺乏对双手与物体协同操作的详细三维标注，难以准确建模复杂交互行为。
AI.method: 构建包含同步多视角RGB-D图像、双手三维姿态、物体六自由度姿态及交互标签的H2O数据集，并设计图卷积网络联合建模双手与物体的交互依赖关系。
AI.result: 该方法在联合手-物体姿态估计任务中建立强基线，在第一视角交互识别中达到最先进准确率。
AI.conclusion: H2O是首个提供双手操作物体详细三维标注的基准数据集，为第一视角交互研究提供了新方向。

search_text: H2O: Two Hands Manipulating Objects for First Person Interaction Recognition H2O：两只手操纵物体进行第一人称交互识别 We present a comprehensive framework for egocentric interaction recognition using markerless 3D annotations of two hands manipulating objects. To this end, we propose a method to create a unified dataset for egocentric 3D interaction recognition. Our method produces annotations of the 3D pose of two hands and the 6D pose of the manipulated objects, along with their interaction labels for each frame. Our dataset, called H2O (2 Hands and Objects), provides synchronized multi-view RGB-D images, interaction labels, object classes, ground-truth 3D poses for left & right hands, 6D object poses, ground-truth camera poses, object meshes and scene point clouds. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first benchmark that enables the study of first-person actions with the use of the pose of both left and right hands manipulating objects and presents an unprecedented level of detail for egocentric 3D interaction recognition. We further propose the method to predict interaction classes by estimating the 3D pose of two hands and the 6D pose of the manipulated objects, jointly from RGB images. Our method models both inter- and intra-dependencies between both hands and objects by learning the topology of a graph convolutional network that predicts interactions. We show that our method facilitated by this dataset establishes a strong baseline for joint hand-object pose estimation and achieves state-of-the-art accuracy for first person interaction recognition. 我们使用两只手操作物体的无标记 3D 注释，提出了一个以自我为中心的交互识别的综合框架。为此，我们提出了一种为以自我为中心的 3D 交互识别创建统一数据集的方法。我们的方法生成两只手的 3D 姿势和被操纵对象的 6D 姿势的注释，以及它们每帧的交互标签。我们的数据集称为 H2O（2 Hands and Objects），提供同步多视图 RGB-D 图像、交互标签、对象类、左手和右手的真实 3D 姿势、6D 对象姿势、真实相机姿势、对象网格和场景点云。据我们所知，这是第一个基准，能够通过使用左右手操纵物体的姿势来研究第一人称动作，并为以自我为中心的 3D 交互识别提供前所未有的细节水平。我们进一步提出了通过从 RGB 图像联合估计两只手的 3D 姿势和操作对象的 6D 姿势来预测交互类别的方法。我们的方法通过学习预测交互的图卷积网络的拓扑来对双手和物体之间的相互依赖和内部依赖进行建模。我们表明，该数据集促进的方法为联合手部物体姿势估计建立了强大的基线，并实现了第一人称交互识别的最先进的准确性。 本文提出一个名为H2O的框架和数据集，用于通过双手与物体的三维标注实现第一视角交互识别。 Taein Kwon,Bugra Tekin,Jan Stuhmer,Federica Bogo,Marc Pollefeys cs.CV

authors_text: Mohamed Hasan,Evangelos Paschalidis,Albert Solernou,He Wang,Gustav Markkula,Richard Romano
title: Maneuver-based Anchor Trajectory Hypotheses at Roundabouts
title_zh: 环岛处基于机动的锚轨迹假设
abstract: Predicting future behavior of the surrounding vehicles is crucial for self-driving platforms to safely navigate through other traffic. This is critical when making decisions like crossing an unsignalized intersection. We address the problem of vehicle motion prediction in a challenging roundabout environment by learning from human driver data. We extend existing recurrent encoder-decoder models to be advantageously combined with anchor trajectories to predict vehicle behaviors on a roundabout. Drivers' intentions are encoded by a set of maneuvers that correspond to semantic driving concepts. Accordingly, our model employs a set of maneuver-specific anchor trajectories that cover the space of possible outcomes at the roundabout. The proposed model can output a multi-modal distribution over the predicted future trajectories based on the maneuver-specific anchors. We evaluate our model using the public RounD dataset and the experiment results show the effectiveness of the proposed maneuver-based anchor regression in improving prediction accuracy, reducing the average RMSE to 28% less than the best baseline. Our code is available at https://github.com/m-hasan-n/roundabout.
summary: Predicting future behavior of the surrounding vehicles is crucial for self-driving platforms to safely navigate through other traffic. This is critical when making decisions like crossing an unsignalized intersection. We address the problem of vehicle motion prediction in a challenging roundabout environment by learning from human driver data. We extend existing recurrent encoder-decoder models to be advantageously combined with anchor trajectories to predict vehicle behaviors on a roundabout. Drivers' intentions are encoded by a set of maneuvers that correspond to semantic driving concepts. Accordingly, our model employs a set of maneuver-specific anchor trajectories that cover the space of possible outcomes at the roundabout. The proposed model can output a multi-modal distribution over the predicted future trajectories based on the maneuver-specific anchors. We evaluate our model using the public RounD dataset and the experiment results show the effectiveness of the proposed maneuver-based anchor regression in improving prediction accuracy, reducing the average RMSE to 28% less than the best baseline. Our code is available at https://github.com/m-hasan-n/roundabout.
abstract_zh: 预测周围车辆的未来行为对于自动驾驶平台安全地穿越其他交通至关重要。这在做出穿越无信号交叉路口等决策时至关重要。我们通过学习人类驾驶员数据来解决具有挑战性的环岛环境中的车辆运动预测问题。我们扩展了现有的循环编码器-解码器模型，以便与锚定轨迹有利地结合起来，以预测环岛上的车辆行为。驾驶员的意图由一组与语义驾驶概念相对应的操作进行编码。因此，我们的模型采用了一组特定于机动的锚轨迹，覆盖了环岛处可能出现的结果的空间。所提出的模型可以根据特定于机动的锚点输出预测的未来轨迹的多模态分布。我们使用公共 RoundD 数据集评估我们的模型，实验结果表明所提出的基于机动的锚回归在提高预测精度方面的有效性，将平均 RMSE 降低到比最佳基线低 28%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/m-hasan-n/roundabout 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于驾驶动作的锚定轨迹假设方法，用于环形交叉口的车辆轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需准确预测周围车辆行为以安全通过复杂路口，而现有方法在环形交叉口场景下预测精度不足。
AI.method: 扩展循环编码器-解码器模型，结合语义驾驶动作（如变道/转弯）生成锚定轨迹，输出多模态轨迹分布。
AI.result: 在RounD数据集上实验显示，该方法使平均RMSE较最佳基线降低28%。
AI.conclusion: 基于动作的锚定轨迹回归有效提升了环形交叉口场景下的轨迹预测准确性。

authors_text: Hassan Akbari,Liangzhe Yuan,Rui Qian,Wei-Hong Chuang,Shih-Fu Chang,Yin Cui,Boqing Gong
title: VATT: Transformers for Multimodal Self-Supervised Learning from Raw Video, Audio and Text
title_zh: VATT：用于从原始视频、音频和文本进行多模式自监督学习的 Transformer
comment: Published in the 35th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2021)
comments: Published in the 35th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2021)
abstract: We present a framework for learning multimodal representations from unlabeled data using convolution-free Transformer architectures. Specifically, our Video-Audio-Text Transformer (VATT) takes raw signals as inputs and extracts multimodal representations that are rich enough to benefit a variety of downstream tasks. We train VATT end-to-end from scratch using multimodal contrastive losses and evaluate its performance by the downstream tasks of video action recognition, audio event classification, image classification, and text-to-video retrieval. Furthermore, we study a modality-agnostic, single-backbone Transformer by sharing weights among the three modalities. We show that the convolution-free VATT outperforms state-of-the-art ConvNet-based architectures in the downstream tasks. Especially, VATT's vision Transformer achieves the top-1 accuracy of 82.1% on Kinetics-400, 83.6% on Kinetics-600, 72.7% on Kinetics-700, and 41.1% on Moments in Time, new records while avoiding supervised pre-training. Transferring to image classification leads to 78.7% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet compared to 64.7% by training the same Transformer from scratch, showing the generalizability of our model despite the domain gap between videos and images. VATT's audio Transformer also sets a new record on waveform-based audio event recognition by achieving the mAP of 39.4% on AudioSet without any supervised pre-training. VATT's source code is publicly available.
summary: We present a framework for learning multimodal representations from unlabeled data using convolution-free Transformer architectures. Specifically, our Video-Audio-Text Transformer (VATT) takes raw signals as inputs and extracts multimodal representations that are rich enough to benefit a variety of downstream tasks. We train VATT end-to-end from scratch using multimodal contrastive losses and evaluate its performance by the downstream tasks of video action recognition, audio event classification, image classification, and text-to-video retrieval. Furthermore, we study a modality-agnostic, single-backbone Transformer by sharing weights among the three modalities. We show that the convolution-free VATT outperforms state-of-the-art ConvNet-based architectures in the downstream tasks. Especially, VATT's vision Transformer achieves the top-1 accuracy of 82.1% on Kinetics-400, 83.6% on Kinetics-600, 72.7% on Kinetics-700, and 41.1% on Moments in Time, new records while avoiding supervised pre-training. Transferring to image classification leads to 78.7% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet compared to 64.7% by training the same Transformer from scratch, showing the generalizability of our model despite the domain gap between videos and images. VATT's audio Transformer also sets a new record on waveform-based audio event recognition by achieving the mAP of 39.4% on AudioSet without any supervised pre-training. VATT's source code is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个使用无卷积 Transformer 架构从未标记数据中学习多模态表示的框架。具体来说，我们的视频音频文本转换器（VATT）将原始信号作为输入，并提取足够丰富的多模态表示，以有利于各种下游任务。我们使用多模态对比损失从头开始训练 VATT，并通过视频动作识别、音频事件分类、图像分类和文本到视频检索等下游任务评估其性能。此外，我们通过在三种模态之间共享权重来研究与模态无关的单主干 Transformer。我们表明，无卷积 VATT 在下游任务中优于最先进的基于 ConvNet 的架构。特别是，VATT 的视觉 Transformer 在 Kinetics-400 上达到了 82.1%、在 Kinetics-600 上达到 83.6%、在 Kinetics-700 上达到 72.7%、在 Moments in Time 上达到 41.1% 的 top-1 准确率，在避免监督预训练的情况下创造了新纪录。转移到图像分类在 ImageNet 上的 top-1 准确率达到 78.7%，而从头开始训练相同的 Transformer 则达到 64.7%，这表明尽管视频和图像之间存在领域差距，我们的模型仍具有通用性。 VATT 的音频 Transformer 还创下了基于波形的音频事件识别的新记录，在没有任何监督预训练的情况下，在 AudioSet 上实现了 39.4% 的 mAP。 VATT 的源代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需卷积的多模态自监督学习框架VATT，从原始视频、音频和文本中学习表示，并在多个下游任务中取得优异性能。
AI.motivation: 现有卷积神经网络（ConvNet）在多模态学习中存在局限性，且依赖监督预训练。本文旨在开发一种无需卷积、无需监督预训练的多模态表示学习方法。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的VATT架构，直接输入原始信号，通过多模态对比损失端到端训练，并共享三模态权重实现单主干网络。
AI.result: VATT在Kinetics-400/600/700等视频动作识别任务中取得新纪录（82.1%-83.6%），音频事件分类在AudioSet达39.4%mAP，图像分类在ImageNet达78.7%准确率。
AI.conclusion: VATT证明了无需卷积和监督预训练的多模态Transformer在跨模态任务中的有效性，展示了其良好的泛化能力与性能优势。

search_text: VATT: Transformers for Multimodal Self-Supervised Learning from Raw Video, Audio and Text VATT：用于从原始视频、音频和文本进行多模式自监督学习的 Transformer We present a framework for learning multimodal representations from unlabeled data using convolution-free Transformer architectures. Specifically, our Video-Audio-Text Transformer (VATT) takes raw signals as inputs and extracts multimodal representations that are rich enough to benefit a variety of downstream tasks. We train VATT end-to-end from scratch using multimodal contrastive losses and evaluate its performance by the downstream tasks of video action recognition, audio event classification, image classification, and text-to-video retrieval. Furthermore, we study a modality-agnostic, single-backbone Transformer by sharing weights among the three modalities. We show that the convolution-free VATT outperforms state-of-the-art ConvNet-based architectures in the downstream tasks. Especially, VATT's vision Transformer achieves the top-1 accuracy of 82.1% on Kinetics-400, 83.6% on Kinetics-600, 72.7% on Kinetics-700, and 41.1% on Moments in Time, new records while avoiding supervised pre-training. Transferring to image classification leads to 78.7% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet compared to 64.7% by training the same Transformer from scratch, showing the generalizability of our model despite the domain gap between videos and images. VATT's audio Transformer also sets a new record on waveform-based audio event recognition by achieving the mAP of 39.4% on AudioSet without any supervised pre-training. VATT's source code is publicly available. 我们提出了一个使用无卷积 Transformer 架构从未标记数据中学习多模态表示的框架。具体来说，我们的视频音频文本转换器（VATT）将原始信号作为输入，并提取足够丰富的多模态表示，以有利于各种下游任务。我们使用多模态对比损失从头开始训练 VATT，并通过视频动作识别、音频事件分类、图像分类和文本到视频检索等下游任务评估其性能。此外，我们通过在三种模态之间共享权重来研究与模态无关的单主干 Transformer。我们表明，无卷积 VATT 在下游任务中优于最先进的基于 ConvNet 的架构。特别是，VATT 的视觉 Transformer 在 Kinetics-400 上达到了 82.1%、在 Kinetics-600 上达到 83.6%、在 Kinetics-700 上达到 72.7%、在 Moments in Time 上达到 41.1% 的 top-1 准确率，在避免监督预训练的情况下创造了新纪录。转移到图像分类在 ImageNet 上的 top-1 准确率达到 78.7%，而从头开始训练相同的 Transformer 则达到 64.7%，这表明尽管视频和图像之间存在领域差距，我们的模型仍具有通用性。 VATT 的音频 Transformer 还创下了基于波形的音频事件识别的新记录，在没有任何监督预训练的情况下，在 AudioSet 上实现了 39.4% 的 mAP。 VATT 的源代码是公开的。 本文提出一种无需卷积的多模态自监督学习框架VATT，从原始视频、音频和文本中学习表示，并在多个下游任务中取得优异性能。 Hassan Akbari,Liangzhe Yuan,Rui Qian,Wei-Hong Chuang,Shih-Fu Chang,Yin Cui,Boqing Gong cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MM,eess.IV

authors_text: Ryuhei Hamaguchi,Yasutaka Furukawa,Masaki Onishi,Ken Sakurada
title: Heterogeneous Grid Convolution for Adaptive, Efficient, and Controllable Computation
title_zh: 用于自适应、高效、可控计算的异构网格卷积
abstract: This paper proposes a novel heterogeneous grid convolution that builds a graph-based image representation by exploiting heterogeneity in the image content, enabling adaptive, efficient, and controllable computations in a convolutional architecture. More concretely, the approach builds a data-adaptive graph structure from a convolutional layer by a differentiable clustering method, pools features to the graph, performs a novel direction-aware graph convolution, and unpool features back to the convolutional layer. By using the developed module, the paper proposes heterogeneous grid convolutional networks, highly efficient yet strong extension of existing architectures. We have evaluated the proposed approach on four image understanding tasks, semantic segmentation, object localization, road extraction, and salient object detection. The proposed method is effective on three of the four tasks. Especially, the method outperforms a strong baseline with more than 90% reduction in floating-point operations for semantic segmentation, and achieves the state-of-the-art result for road extraction. We will share our code, model, and data.
summary: This paper proposes a novel heterogeneous grid convolution that builds a graph-based image representation by exploiting heterogeneity in the image content, enabling adaptive, efficient, and controllable computations in a convolutional architecture. More concretely, the approach builds a data-adaptive graph structure from a convolutional layer by a differentiable clustering method, pools features to the graph, performs a novel direction-aware graph convolution, and unpool features back to the convolutional layer. By using the developed module, the paper proposes heterogeneous grid convolutional networks, highly efficient yet strong extension of existing architectures. We have evaluated the proposed approach on four image understanding tasks, semantic segmentation, object localization, road extraction, and salient object detection. The proposed method is effective on three of the four tasks. Especially, the method outperforms a strong baseline with more than 90% reduction in floating-point operations for semantic segmentation, and achieves the state-of-the-art result for road extraction. We will share our code, model, and data.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的异构网格卷积，它通过利用图像内容的异构性来构建基于图的图像表示，从而在卷积架构中实现自适应、高效和可控的计算。更具体地说，该方法通过可微分聚类方法从卷积层构建数据自适应图结构，将特征池化到图，执行新颖的方向感知图卷积，并将特征反池化回卷积层。通过使用开发的模块，本文提出了异构网格卷积网络，高效且对现有架构的强大扩展。我们在四个图像理解任务、语义分割、对象定位、道路提取和显着对象检测上评估了所提出的方法。所提出的方法对四项任务中的三项有效。特别是，该方法优于强大的基线，语义分割的浮点运算减少了 90% 以上，并实现了道路提取的最先进结果。我们将分享我们的代码、模型和数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种异构网格卷积方法，通过构建数据自适应的图结构，实现卷积网络中自适应、高效且可控的计算。
AI.motivation: 现有卷积网络在处理异质图像内容时计算效率和灵活性不足，需一种能适应不同图像特征的结构以提升性能。
AI.method: 通过可微聚类方法构建数据自适应图结构，池化特征至图上，进行方向感知的图卷积，再回池化至卷积层，形成异构网格卷积网络。
AI.result: 在语义分割、目标定位、道路提取和显著性检测四类任务中，该方法在三项任务中有效，其中语义分割减少90%浮点运算，道路提取达SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: 异构网格卷积在保持高效性的同时提升了模型性能，未来将公开代码与数据以促进进一步研究。

authors_text: Lucrezia Grassi,Carmine Tommaso Recchiuto,Antonio Sgorbissa
title: Knowledge Triggering, Extraction and Storage via Human-Robot Verbal Interaction
title_zh: 通过人机言语交互触发、提取和存储知识
comment: 19 pages, 7 figures, submitted to Robotics and Autonomous Systems
comments: 19 pages, 7 figures, submitted to Robotics and Autonomous Systems
abstract: This article describes a novel approach to expand in run-time the knowledge base of an Artificial Conversational Agent. A technique for automatic knowledge extraction from the user's sentence and four methods to insert the new acquired concepts in the knowledge base have been developed and integrated into a system that has already been tested for knowledge-based conversation between a social humanoid robot and residents of care homes. The run-time addition of new knowledge allows overcoming some limitations that affect most robots and chatbots: the incapability of engaging the user for a long time due to the restricted number of conversation topics. The insertion in the knowledge base of new concepts recognized in the user's sentence is expected to result in a wider range of topics that can be covered during an interaction, making the conversation less repetitive. Two experiments are presented to assess the performance of the knowledge extraction technique, and the efficiency of the developed insertion methods when adding several concepts in the Ontology.
summary: This article describes a novel approach to expand in run-time the knowledge base of an Artificial Conversational Agent. A technique for automatic knowledge extraction from the user's sentence and four methods to insert the new acquired concepts in the knowledge base have been developed and integrated into a system that has already been tested for knowledge-based conversation between a social humanoid robot and residents of care homes. The run-time addition of new knowledge allows overcoming some limitations that affect most robots and chatbots: the incapability of engaging the user for a long time due to the restricted number of conversation topics. The insertion in the knowledge base of new concepts recognized in the user's sentence is expected to result in a wider range of topics that can be covered during an interaction, making the conversation less repetitive. Two experiments are presented to assess the performance of the knowledge extraction technique, and the efficiency of the developed insertion methods when adding several concepts in the Ontology.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了一种在运行时扩展人工会话代理知识库的新颖方法。一种从用户句子中自动提取知识的技术和四种将新获得的概念插入知识库的方法已经开发出来，并集成到一个系统中，该系统已经过社交人形机器人和疗养院居民之间基于知识的对话的测试。运行时添加新知识可以克服影响大多数机器人和聊天机器人的一些限制：由于对话主题数量有限，无法长时间吸引用户。在知识库中插入用户句子中识别出的新概念预计将导致交互过程中可以涵盖的主题范围更广，从而减少对话的重复性。提出了两个实验来评估知识提取技术的性能，以及在本体中添加多个概念时所开发的插入方法的效率。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过人机对话实时扩展机器人知识库的方法，以提升对话多样性和持续性。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人和聊天机器人因知识库有限，难以维持长时间对话，需通过动态知识更新提升互动性。
AI.method: 开发自动提取用户语句知识的算法，结合四种知识插入方法，并集成到人机对话系统中进行验证。
AI.result: 实验验证了知识提取技术的有效性，以及插入方法在扩展知识库时的高效性。
AI.conclusion: 实时知识更新机制能有效提升机器人对话的多样性和用户参与度，为长期人机交互提供支持。

Two experiments are presented to assess the performance of the knowledge extraction technique, and the efficiency of the developed insertion methods when adding several concepts in the Ontology. 本文描述了一种在运行时扩展人工会话代理知识库的新颖方法。一种从用户句子中自动提取知识的技术和四种将新获得的概念插入知识库的方法已经开发出来，并集成到一个系统中，该系统已经过社交人形机器人和疗养院居民之间基于知识的对话的测试。运行时添加新知识可以克服影响大多数机器人和聊天机器人的一些限制：由于对话主题数量有限，无法长时间吸引用户。在知识库中插入用户句子中识别出的新概念预计将导致交互过程中可以涵盖的主题范围更广，从而减少对话的重复性。提出了两个实验来评估知识提取技术的性能，以及在本体中添加多个概念时所开发的插入方法的效率。 提出一种通过人机对话实时扩展机器人知识库的方法，以提升对话多样性和持续性。 Lucrezia Grassi,Carmine Tommaso Recchiuto,Antonio Sgorbissa cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Seongsik Park,Dongjin Lee,Sungroh Yoon
title: Noise-Robust Deep Spiking Neural Networks with Temporal Information
title_zh: 具有时间信息的抗噪声深度尖峰神经网络
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) have emerged as energy-efficient neural networks with temporal information. SNNs have shown a superior efficiency on neuromorphic devices, but the devices are susceptible to noise, which hinders them from being applied in real-world applications. Several studies have increased noise robustness, but most of them considered neither deep SNNs nor temporal information. In this paper, we investigate the effect of noise on deep SNNs with various neural coding methods and present a noise-robust deep SNN with temporal information. With the proposed methods, we have achieved a deep SNN that is efficient and robust to spike deletion and jitter.
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) have emerged as energy-efficient neural networks with temporal information. SNNs have shown a superior efficiency on neuromorphic devices, but the devices are susceptible to noise, which hinders them from being applied in real-world applications. Several studies have increased noise robustness, but most of them considered neither deep SNNs nor temporal information. In this paper, we investigate the effect of noise on deep SNNs with various neural coding methods and present a noise-robust deep SNN with temporal information. With the proposed methods, we have achieved a deep SNN that is efficient and robust to spike deletion and jitter.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 已成为具有时间信息的节能神经网络。 SNN 在神经形态设备上表现出了卓越的效率，但这些设备容易受到噪声的影响，这阻碍了它们在实际应用中的应用。一些研究提高了噪声鲁棒性，但大多数研究既没有考虑深度 SNN，也没有考虑时间信息。在本文中，我们利用各种神经编码方法研究了噪声对深度 SNN 的影响，并提出了一种具有时间信息的抗噪声深度 SNN。通过所提出的方法，我们实现了一种对于尖峰删除和抖动有效且鲁棒的深度 SNN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种具有时间信息的噪声鲁棒深度脉冲神经网络（SNN），以解决现有研究在深度SNN中忽略噪声鲁棒性的问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管SNN在能效方面表现优异，但其在实际应用中易受噪声影响，而现有研究大多未考虑深度SNN与时间信息的结合，导致噪声鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 通过分析不同神经编码方法下噪声对深度SNN的影响，提出结合时间信息的噪声鲁棒模型设计方法。
AI.result: 实现了对脉冲删除和抖动具有鲁棒性的高效深度SNN，在保持能效优势的同时提升实际应用可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效增强了深度SNN的噪声鲁棒性，为SNN在实际场景中的部署提供了理论支持与技术路径。

authors_text: Zahra Gharaee
title: Hierarchical growing grid networks for skeleton based action recognition
title_zh: 用于基于骨架的动作识别的分层生长网格网络
abstract: In this paper, a novel cognitive architecture for action recognition is developed by applying layers of growing grid neural networks.Using these layers makes the system capable of automatically arranging its representational structure. In addition to the expansion of the neural map during the growth phase, the system is provided with a prior knowledge of the input space, which increases the processing speed of the learning phase. Apart from two layers of growing grid networks the architecture is composed of a preprocessing layer, an ordered vector representation layer and a one-layer supervised neural network. These layers are designed to solve the action recognition problem. The first-layer growing grid receives the input data of human actions and the neural map generates an action pattern vector representing each action sequence by connecting the elicited activation of the trained map. The pattern vectors are then sent to the ordered vector representation layer to build the time-invariant input vectors of key activations for the second-layer growing grid. The second-layer growing grid categorizes the input vectors to the corresponding action clusters/sub-clusters and finally the one-layer supervised neural network labels the shaped clusters with action labels. Three experiments using different datasets of actions show that the system is capable of learning to categorize the actions quickly and efficiently. The performance of the growing grid architecture is com-pared with the results from a system based on Self-Organizing Maps, showing that the growing grid architecture performs significantly superior on the action recognition tasks.
summary: In this paper, a novel cognitive architecture for action recognition is developed by applying layers of growing grid neural networks.Using these layers makes the system capable of automatically arranging its representational structure. In addition to the expansion of the neural map during the growth phase, the system is provided with a prior knowledge of the input space, which increases the processing speed of the learning phase. Apart from two layers of growing grid networks the architecture is composed of a preprocessing layer, an ordered vector representation layer and a one-layer supervised neural network. These layers are designed to solve the action recognition problem. The first-layer growing grid receives the input data of human actions and the neural map generates an action pattern vector representing each action sequence by connecting the elicited activation of the trained map. The pattern vectors are then sent to the ordered vector representation layer to build the time-invariant input vectors of key activations for the second-layer growing grid. The second-layer growing grid categorizes the input vectors to the corresponding action clusters/sub-clusters and finally the one-layer supervised neural network labels the shaped clusters with action labels. Three experiments using different datasets of actions show that the system is capable of learning to categorize the actions quickly and efficiently. The performance of the growing grid architecture is com-pared with the results from a system based on Self-Organizing Maps, showing that the growing grid architecture performs significantly superior on the action recognition tasks.
abstract_zh: 本文通过应用不断增长的网格神经网络层，开发了一种用于动作识别的新颖认知架构。使用这些层使系统能够自动安排其表示结构。除了在生长阶段扩展神经图谱之外，系统还提供了输入空间的先验知识，这提高了学习阶段的处理速度。除了两层不断增长的网格网络之外，该架构还由预处理层、有序向量表示层和单层监督神经网络组成。这些层旨在解决动作识别问题。第一层生长网格接收人类动作的输入数据，神经图通过连接训练图的引发激活来生成代表每个动作序列的动作模式向量。然后，模式向量被发送到有序向量表示层，以构建第二层生长网格的关键激活的时不变输入向量。第二层生长网格将输入向量分类到相应的动作簇/子簇，最后一层监督神经网络用动作标签标记成形的簇。使用不同动作数据集的三个实验表明，系统能够学习快速有效地对动作进行分类。将生长网格架构的性能与基于自组织映射的系统的结果进行比较，表明生长网格架构在动作识别任务上表现明显优越。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于层次化增长网格网络的骨架动作识别架构，通过多层神经网络自动构建表示结构以提高动作分类效率。
AI.motivation: 传统动作识别方法在处理复杂动作序列时存在表示结构固定、学习效率低的问题，需设计能自适应扩展且结合先验知识的神经网络架构。
AI.method: 构建包含预处理层、有序向量表示层、双层增长网格网络及监督神经网络的分层架构，利用增长网格网络动态生成动作模式向量并进行聚类分类。
AI.result: 在三个不同数据集的实验中，该架构在动作分类速度和准确率上均显著优于基于自组织映射的竞争系统。
AI.conclusion: 层次化增长网格网络通过自适应结构扩展和先验知识融合，有效提升了骨架数据驱动的动作识别性能。

authors_text: Matan Rusanovsky,Ofer Beeri,Gal Oren
title: An End-to-End Computer Vision Methodology for Quantitative Metallography
title_zh: 用于定量金相学的端到端计算机视觉方法
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2003.04226 Same text as last submission, changed the author list to correspond to the pdf
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2003.04226 Same text as last submission, changed the author list to correspond to the pdf
abstract: Metallography is crucial for a proper assessment of material's properties. It involves mainly the investigation of spatial distribution of grains and the occurrence and characteristics of inclusions or precipitates. This work presents an holistic artificial intelligence model for Anomaly Detection that automatically quantifies the degree of anomaly of impurities in alloys. We suggest the following examination process: (1) Deep semantic segmentation is performed on the inclusions (based on a suitable metallographic database of alloys and corresponding tags of inclusions), producing inclusions masks that are saved into a separated database. (2) Deep image inpainting is performed to fill the removed inclusions parts, resulting in 'clean' metallographic images, which contain the background of grains. (3) Grains' boundaries are marked using deep semantic segmentation (based on another metallographic database of alloys), producing boundaries that are ready for further inspection on the distribution of grains' size. (4) Deep anomaly detection and pattern recognition is performed on the inclusions masks to determine spatial, shape and area anomaly detection of the inclusions. Finally, the system recommends to an expert on areas of interests for further examination. The performance of the model is presented and analyzed based on few representative cases. Although the models presented here were developed for metallography analysis, most of them can be generalized to a wider set of problems in which anomaly detection of geometrical objects is desired. All models as well as the data-sets that were created for this work, are publicly available at https://github.com/Scientific-Computing-Lab-NRCN/MLography.
summary: Metallography is crucial for a proper assessment of material's properties. It involves mainly the investigation of spatial distribution of grains and the occurrence and characteristics of inclusions or precipitates. This work presents an holistic artificial intelligence model for Anomaly Detection that automatically quantifies the degree of anomaly of impurities in alloys. We suggest the following examination process: (1) Deep semantic segmentation is performed on the inclusions (based on a suitable metallographic database of alloys and corresponding tags of inclusions), producing inclusions masks that are saved into a separated database. (2) Deep image inpainting is performed to fill the removed inclusions parts, resulting in 'clean' metallographic images, which contain the background of grains. (3) Grains' boundaries are marked using deep semantic segmentation (based on another metallographic database of alloys), producing boundaries that are ready for further inspection on the distribution of grains' size. (4) Deep anomaly detection and pattern recognition is performed on the inclusions masks to determine spatial, shape and area anomaly detection of the inclusions. Finally, the system recommends to an expert on areas of interests for further examination. The performance of the model is presented and analyzed based on few representative cases. Although the models presented here were developed for metallography analysis, most of them can be generalized to a wider set of problems in which anomaly detection of geometrical objects is desired. All models as well as the data-sets that were created for this work, are publicly available at https://github.com/Scientific-Computing-Lab-NRCN/MLography.
abstract_zh: 金相学对于正确评估材料性能至关重要。它主要涉及晶粒的空间分布以及夹杂物或析出物的出现和特征的研究。这项工作提出了一种用于异常检测的整体人工智能模型，可以自动量化合金中杂质的异常程度。我们建议采用以下检查流程：（1）对夹杂物进行深度语义分割（基于合适的合金金相数据库和相应的夹杂物标签），生成夹杂物掩模并保存到单独的数据库中。 (2)进行深度图像修复，填充去除的夹杂物部分，得到“干净”的金相图像，其中包含晶粒的背景。 (3) 使用深度语义分割（基于另一个合金金相数据库）来标记晶粒边界，产生可供进一步检查晶粒尺寸分布的边界。 (4)对包裹体掩模进行深度异常检测和模式识别，确定包裹体的空间、形状和面积异常检测。最后，系统会推荐感兴趣领域的专家进行进一步检查。基于几个代表性案例对该模型的性能进行了展示和分析。尽管此处介绍的模型是为金相分析而开发的，但其中大多数可以推广到需要对几何对象进行异常检测的更广泛的问题。为此工作创建的所有模型以及数据集均可在 https://github.com/Scientific-Computing-Lab-NRCN/MLography 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的计算机视觉方法，用于定量金相分析，通过深度学习自动检测合金中杂质的异常程度。
AI.motivation: 金相分析对材料性能评估至关重要，但传统方法依赖人工检测效率低且主观性强，需自动化解决方案提高准确性和效率。
AI.method: 方法分为四步：（1）利用深度语义分割对杂质进行分割并生成掩膜；（2）通过深度图像修复生成无杂质的清洁图像；（3）分割晶界以分析晶粒分布；（4）基于掩膜进行异常检测与模式识别，最终推荐专家关注区域。
AI.result: 模型在多个案例中验证有效，可自动量化杂质异常并生成晶粒分布数据，所有模型和数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅适用于金相分析，还可推广至其他几何对象异常检测领域，为材料科学提供高效工具。

search_text: An End-to-End Computer Vision Methodology for Quantitative Metallography 用于定量金相学的端到端计算机视觉方法 Metallography is crucial for a proper assessment of material's properties. It involves mainly the investigation of spatial distribution of grains and the occurrence and characteristics of inclusions or precipitates. This work presents an holistic artificial intelligence model for Anomaly Detection that automatically quantifies the degree of anomaly of impurities in alloys. We suggest the following examination process: (1) Deep semantic segmentation is performed on the inclusions (based on a suitable metallographic database of alloys and corresponding tags of inclusions), producing inclusions masks that are saved into a separated database. (2) Deep image inpainting is performed to fill the removed inclusions parts, resulting in 'clean' metallographic images, which contain the background of grains. (3) Grains' boundaries are marked using deep semantic segmentation (based on another metallographic database of alloys), producing boundaries that are ready for further inspection on the distribution of grains' size. (4) Deep anomaly detection and pattern recognition is performed on the inclusions masks to determine spatial, shape and area anomaly detection of the inclusions. Finally, the system recommends to an expert on areas of interests for further examination. The performance of the model is presented and analyzed based on few representative cases. Although the models presented here were developed for metallography analysis, most of them can be generalized to a wider set of problems in which anomaly detection of geometrical objects is desired. All models as well as the data-sets that were created for this work, are publicly available at https://github.com/Scientific-Computing-Lab-NRCN/MLography. 金相学对于正确评估材料性能至关重要。它主要涉及晶粒的空间分布以及夹杂物或析出物的出现和特征的研究。这项工作提出了一种用于异常检测的整体人工智能模型，可以自动量化合金中杂质的异常程度。我们建议采用以下检查流程：（1）对夹杂物进行深度语义分割（基于合适的合金金相数据库和相应的夹杂物标签），生成夹杂物掩模并保存到单独的数据库中。 (2)进行深度图像修复，填充去除的夹杂物部分，得到“干净”的金相图像，其中包含晶粒的背景。 (3) 使用深度语义分割（基于另一个合金金相数据库）来标记晶粒边界，产生可供进一步检查晶粒尺寸分布的边界。 (4)对包裹体掩模进行深度异常检测和模式识别，确定包裹体的空间、形状和面积异常检测。最后，系统会推荐感兴趣领域的专家进行进一步检查。基于几个代表性案例对该模型的性能进行了展示和分析。尽管此处介绍的模型是为金相分析而开发的，但其中大多数可以推广到需要对几何对象进行异常检测的更广泛的问题。为此工作创建的所有模型以及数据集均可在 https://github.com/Scientific-Computing-Lab-NRCN/MLography 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种端到端的计算机视觉方法，用于定量金相分析，通过深度学习自动检测合金中杂质的异常程度。 Matan Rusanovsky,Ofer Beeri,Gal Oren cond-mat.mtrl-sci,cs.CV,cs.LG,physics.data-an

authors_text: Felix Schoeller,Mark Miller,Roy Salomon,Karl J. Friston
title: Trust as Extended Control: Active Inference and User Feedback During Human-Robot Collaboration
title_zh: 信任作为扩展控制：人机协作期间的主动推理和用户反馈
abstract: To interact seamlessly with robots, users must infer the causes of a robot's behavior and be confident about that inference. Hence, trust is a necessary condition for human-robot collaboration (HRC). Despite its crucial role, it is largely unknown how trust emerges, develops, and supports human interactions with nonhuman artefacts. Here, we review the literature on trust, human-robot interaction, human-robot collaboration, and human interaction at large. Early models of trust suggest that trust entails a trade-off between benevolence and competence, while studies of human-to-human interaction emphasize the role of shared behavior and mutual knowledge in the gradual building of trust. We then introduce a model of trust as an agent's best explanation for reliable sensory exchange with an extended motor plant or partner. This model is based on the cognitive neuroscience of active inference and suggests that, in the context of HRC, trust can be cast in terms of virtual control over an artificial agent. In this setting, interactive feedback becomes a necessary component of the trustor's perception-action cycle. The resulting model has important implications for understanding human-robot interaction and collaboration, as it allows the traditional determinants of human trust to be defined in terms of active inference, information exchange and empowerment. Furthermore, this model suggests that boredom and surprise may be used as markers for under and over-reliance on the system. Finally, we examine the role of shared behavior in the genesis of trust, especially in the context of dyadic collaboration, suggesting important consequences for the acceptability and design of human-robot collaborative systems.
summary: To interact seamlessly with robots, users must infer the causes of a robot's behavior and be confident about that inference. Hence, trust is a necessary condition for human-robot collaboration (HRC). Despite its crucial role, it is largely unknown how trust emerges, develops, and supports human interactions with nonhuman artefacts. Here, we review the literature on trust, human-robot interaction, human-robot collaboration, and human interaction at large. Early models of trust suggest that trust entails a trade-off between benevolence and competence, while studies of human-to-human interaction emphasize the role of shared behavior and mutual knowledge in the gradual building of trust. We then introduce a model of trust as an agent's best explanation for reliable sensory exchange with an extended motor plant or partner. This model is based on the cognitive neuroscience of active inference and suggests that, in the context of HRC, trust can be cast in terms of virtual control over an artificial agent. In this setting, interactive feedback becomes a necessary component of the trustor's perception-action cycle. The resulting model has important implications for understanding human-robot interaction and collaboration, as it allows the traditional determinants of human trust to be defined in terms of active inference, information exchange and empowerment. Furthermore, this model suggests that boredom and surprise may be used as markers for under and over-reliance on the system. Finally, we examine the role of shared behavior in the genesis of trust, especially in the context of dyadic collaboration, suggesting important consequences for the acceptability and design of human-robot collaborative systems.
abstract_zh: 为了与机器人无缝交互，用户必须推断机器人行为的原因，并对这种推断充满信心。因此，信任是人机协作（HRC）的必要条件。尽管信任发挥着至关重要的作用，但人们基本上不知道信任是如何出现、发展和支持人类与非人类人工制品的互动的。在这里，我们回顾了有关信任、人机交互、人机协作以及人类交互的文献。早期的信任模型表明，信任需要在仁慈和能力之间进行权衡，而人与人互动的研究则强调共同行为和相互知识在逐步建立信任中的作用。然后，我们引入一种信任模型，作为代理人与扩展的汽车工厂或合作伙伴进行可靠的感官交换的最佳解释。该模型基于主动推理的认知神经科学，并表明在 HRC 的背景下，可以通过对人工智能代理的虚拟控制来建立信任。在这种情况下，交互式反馈成为信任者感知-行动周期的必要组成部分。由此产生的模型对于理解人机交互和协作具有重要意义，因为它允许根据主动推理、信息交换和授权来定义人类信任的传统决定因素。此外，该模型表明，无聊和惊讶可以作为对系统依赖不足和过度依赖的标志。最后，我们研究了共享行为在信任起源中的作用，特别是在二元协作的背景下，这表明对人机协作系统的可接受性和设计的重要影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于主动推理的模型，将信任视为人类在人机协作中对机器人行为的可靠感知与虚拟控制，强调用户反馈在信任形成中的作用。
AI.motivation: 尽管信任是人机协作的关键，但其形成机制和动态发展仍不明确，需结合认知神经科学理论建立新模型以指导协作系统设计。
AI.method: 通过文献综述整合信任理论与人机交互研究，结合主动推理框架构建信任模型，分析共享行为与反馈机制对信任的影响。
AI.result: 提出信任作为虚拟控制的理论模型，揭示信息交换、赋能感与反馈循环的关系，并指出无聊与惊讶可作为信任偏差的指标。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为理解人机信任机制提供新视角，强调共享行为设计对提升协作系统可接受性的重要性，为未来人机交互研究提供理论基础。

authors_text: Debesh Jha,Nikhil Kumar Tomar,Sharib Ali,Michael A. Riegler,Håvard D. Johansen,Dag Johansen,Thomas de Lange,Pål Halvorsen
title: NanoNet: Real-Time Polyp Segmentation in Video Capsule Endoscopy and Colonoscopy
title_zh: NanoNet：视频胶囊内窥镜和结肠镜检查中的实时息肉分割
abstract: Deep learning in gastrointestinal endoscopy can assist to improve clinical performance and be helpful to assess lesions more accurately. To this extent, semantic segmentation methods that can perform automated real-time delineation of a region-of-interest, e.g., boundary identification of cancer or precancerous lesions, can benefit both diagnosis and interventions. However, accurate and real-time segmentation of endoscopic images is extremely challenging due to its high operator dependence and high-definition image quality. To utilize automated methods in clinical settings, it is crucial to design lightweight models with low latency such that they can be integrated with low-end endoscope hardware devices. In this work, we propose NanoNet, a novel architecture for the segmentation of video capsule endoscopy and colonoscopy images. Our proposed architecture allows real-time performance and has higher segmentation accuracy compared to other more complex ones. We use video capsule endoscopy and standard colonoscopy datasets with polyps, and a dataset consisting of endoscopy biopsies and surgical instruments, to evaluate the effectiveness of our approach. Our experiments demonstrate the increased performance of our architecture in terms of a trade-off between model complexity, speed, model parameters, and metric performances. Moreover, the resulting model size is relatively tiny, with only nearly 36,000 parameters compared to traditional deep learning approaches having millions of parameters.
summary: Deep learning in gastrointestinal endoscopy can assist to improve clinical performance and be helpful to assess lesions more accurately. To this extent, semantic segmentation methods that can perform automated real-time delineation of a region-of-interest, e.g., boundary identification of cancer or precancerous lesions, can benefit both diagnosis and interventions. However, accurate and real-time segmentation of endoscopic images is extremely challenging due to its high operator dependence and high-definition image quality. To utilize automated methods in clinical settings, it is crucial to design lightweight models with low latency such that they can be integrated with low-end endoscope hardware devices. In this work, we propose NanoNet, a novel architecture for the segmentation of video capsule endoscopy and colonoscopy images. Our proposed architecture allows real-time performance and has higher segmentation accuracy compared to other more complex ones. We use video capsule endoscopy and standard colonoscopy datasets with polyps, and a dataset consisting of endoscopy biopsies and surgical instruments, to evaluate the effectiveness of our approach. Our experiments demonstrate the increased performance of our architecture in terms of a trade-off between model complexity, speed, model parameters, and metric performances. Moreover, the resulting model size is relatively tiny, with only nearly 36,000 parameters compared to traditional deep learning approaches having millions of parameters.
abstract_zh: 胃肠内窥镜检查中的深度学习有助于提高临床表现，有助于更准确地评估病变。从这个意义上说，可以自动实时描绘感兴趣区域的语义分割方法，例如癌症或癌前病变的边界识别，可以有利于诊断和干预。然而，由于内窥镜图像对操作员的高度依赖性和高清图像质量，准确实时的内窥镜图像分割极具挑战性。为了在临床环境中利用自动化方法，设计具有低延迟的轻量级模型至关重要，以便它们可以与低端内窥镜硬件设备集成。在这项工作中，我们提出了 NanoNet，一种用于视频胶囊内窥镜检查和结肠镜检查图像分割的新颖架构。与其他更复杂的体系结构相比，我们提出的体系结构允许实时性能并且具有更高的分割精度。我们使用视频胶囊内窥镜检查和带有息肉的标准结肠镜检查数据集，以及由内窥镜活检和手术器械组成的数据集，来评估我们方法的有效性。我们的实验证明了我们的架构在模型复杂性、速度、模型参数和指标性能之间的权衡方面提高了性能。此外，与具有数百万参数的传统深度学习方法相比，生成的模型规模相对较小，只有近 36,000 个参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NanoNet，一种用于视频胶囊内镜和结肠镜实时息肉分割的轻量级深度学习模型。
AI.motivation: 内镜图像分割面临操作者依赖性强、图像高清导致的实时性挑战，需设计轻量级模型以适配低端设备并提升临床效率。
AI.method: 设计NanoNet架构，通过优化模型复杂度和参数量（仅3.6万参数），结合多数据集（含息肉、活检和手术器械）验证其分割效果。
AI.result: NanoNet在分割精度、速度及模型复杂度间取得平衡，相较传统模型参数量减少数百倍，且保持较高分割性能。
AI.conclusion: NanoNet有效解决了内镜实时分割的轻量化与精度矛盾，为临床部署提供了可行方案。

search_text: NanoNet: Real-Time Polyp Segmentation in Video Capsule Endoscopy and Colonoscopy NanoNet：视频胶囊内窥镜和结肠镜检查中的实时息肉分割 Deep learning in gastrointestinal endoscopy can assist to improve clinical performance and be helpful to assess lesions more accurately. To this extent, semantic segmentation methods that can perform automated real-time delineation of a region-of-interest, e.g., boundary identification of cancer or precancerous lesions, can benefit both diagnosis and interventions. However, accurate and real-time segmentation of endoscopic images is extremely challenging due to its high operator dependence and high-definition image quality. To utilize automated methods in clinical settings, it is crucial to design lightweight models with low latency such that they can be integrated with low-end endoscope hardware devices. In this work, we propose NanoNet, a novel architecture for the segmentation of video capsule endoscopy and colonoscopy images. Our proposed architecture allows real-time performance and has higher segmentation accuracy compared to other more complex ones. We use video capsule endoscopy and standard colonoscopy datasets with polyps, and a dataset consisting of endoscopy biopsies and surgical instruments, to evaluate the effectiveness of our approach. Our experiments demonstrate the increased performance of our architecture in terms of a trade-off between model complexity, speed, model parameters, and metric performances. Moreover, the resulting model size is relatively tiny, with only nearly 36,000 parameters compared to traditional deep learning approaches having millions of parameters. 胃肠内窥镜检查中的深度学习有助于提高临床表现，有助于更准确地评估病变。从这个意义上说，可以自动实时描绘感兴趣区域的语义分割方法，例如癌症或癌前病变的边界识别，可以有利于诊断和干预。然而，由于内窥镜图像对操作员的高度依赖性和高清图像质量，准确实时的内窥镜图像分割极具挑战性。为了在临床环境中利用自动化方法，设计具有低延迟的轻量级模型至关重要，以便它们可以与低端内窥镜硬件设备集成。在这项工作中，我们提出了 NanoNet，一种用于视频胶囊内窥镜检查和结肠镜检查图像分割的新颖架构。与其他更复杂的体系结构相比，我们提出的体系结构允许实时性能并且具有更高的分割精度。我们使用视频胶囊内窥镜检查和带有息肉的标准结肠镜检查数据集，以及由内窥镜活检和手术器械组成的数据集，来评估我们方法的有效性。我们的实验证明了我们的架构在模型复杂性、速度、模型参数和指标性能之间的权衡方面提高了性能。此外，与具有数百万参数的传统深度学习方法相比，生成的模型规模相对较小，只有近 36,000 个参数。 本文提出NanoNet，一种用于视频胶囊内镜和结肠镜实时息肉分割的轻量级深度学习模型。 Debesh Jha,Nikhil Kumar Tomar,Sharib Ali,Michael A. authors_text: Anibal Fuentes,Jose M. Saavedra
title: Sketch-QNet: A Quadruplet ConvNet for Color Sketch-based Image Retrieval
title_zh: Sketch-QNet：用于基于彩色草图的图像检索的四元组卷积网络
abstract: Architectures based on siamese networks with triplet loss have shown outstanding performance on the image-based similarity search problem. This approach attempts to discriminate between positive (relevant) and negative (irrelevant) items. However, it undergoes a critical weakness. Given a query, it cannot discriminate weakly relevant items, for instance, items of the same type but different color or texture as the given query, which could be a serious limitation for many real-world search applications. Therefore, in this work, we present a quadruplet-based architecture that overcomes the aforementioned weakness. Moreover, we present an instance of this quadruplet network, which we call Sketch-QNet, to deal with the color sketch-based image retrieval (CSBIR) problem, achieving new state-of-the-art results.
summary: Architectures based on siamese networks with triplet loss have shown outstanding performance on the image-based similarity search problem. This approach attempts to discriminate between positive (relevant) and negative (irrelevant) items. However, it undergoes a critical weakness. Given a query, it cannot discriminate weakly relevant items, for instance, items of the same type but different color or texture as the given query, which could be a serious limitation for many real-world search applications. Therefore, in this work, we present a quadruplet-based architecture that overcomes the aforementioned weakness. Moreover, we present an instance of this quadruplet network, which we call Sketch-QNet, to deal with the color sketch-based image retrieval (CSBIR) problem, achieving new state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 基于具有三元组损失的暹罗网络的架构在基于图像的相似性搜索问题上表现出了出色的性能。这种方法试图区分积极（相关）和消极（不相关）的项目。然而，它有一个严重的弱点。给定一个查询，它无法区分弱相关的项目，例如与给定查询类型相同但颜色或纹理不同的项目，这可能是许多现实世界搜索应用程序的严重限制。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于四元组的架构来克服上述弱点。此外，我们提出了这个四元组网络的一个实例，我们称之为 Sketch-QNet，用于处理基于彩色草图的图像检索（CSBIR）问题，取得了新的最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sketch-QNet，一种基于四元组卷积网络的架构，用于解决基于彩色草图的图像检索问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于三元组损失的孪生网络在区分弱相关项（如颜色或纹理不同但类型相同的物品）时存在局限，影响实际应用效果。
AI.method: 设计四元组损失函数架构，通过引入额外样本约束增强区分能力，并实例化为Sketch-QNet网络处理彩色草图检索任务。
AI.result: 在CSBIR任务中取得新的最先进结果，显著优于传统三元组方法。
AI.conclusion: 四元组架构有效解决了弱相关项区分难题，Sketch-QNet验证了该方法在彩色草图检索中的优越性。

authors_text: Janne Pylkkönen,Antti Ukkonen,Juho Kilpikoski,Samu Tamminen,Hannes Heikinheimo
title: Fast Text-Only Domain Adaptation of RNN-Transducer Prediction Network
title_zh: RNN-传感器预测网络的快速纯文本域适应
abstract: Adaption of end-to-end speech recognition systems to new tasks is known to be challenging. A number of solutions have been proposed which apply external language models with various fusion methods, possibly with a combination of two-pass decoding. Also TTS systems have been used to generate adaptation data for the end-to-end models. In this paper we show that RNN-transducer models can be effectively adapted to new domains using only small amounts of textual data. By taking advantage of model's inherent structure, where the prediction network is interpreted as a language model, we can apply fast adaptation to the model. Adapting the model avoids the need for complicated decoding time fusions and external language models. Using appropriate regularization, the prediction network can be adapted to new domains while still retaining good generalization capabilities. We show with multiple ASR evaluation tasks how this method can provide relative gains of 10-45% in target task WER. We also share insights how RNN-transducer prediction network performs as a language model.
summary: Adaption of end-to-end speech recognition systems to new tasks is known to be challenging. A number of solutions have been proposed which apply external language models with various fusion methods, possibly with a combination of two-pass decoding. Also TTS systems have been used to generate adaptation data for the end-to-end models. In this paper we show that RNN-transducer models can be effectively adapted to new domains using only small amounts of textual data. By taking advantage of model's inherent structure, where the prediction network is interpreted as a language model, we can apply fast adaptation to the model. Adapting the model avoids the need for complicated decoding time fusions and external language models. Using appropriate regularization, the prediction network can be adapted to new domains while still retaining good generalization capabilities. We show with multiple ASR evaluation tasks how this method can provide relative gains of 10-45% in target task WER. We also share insights how RNN-transducer prediction network performs as a language model.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，端到端语音识别系统适应新任务具有挑战性。已经提出了许多解决方案，这些解决方案将外部语言模型与各种融合方法一起应用，可能与两遍解码相结合。 TTS 系统也被用来生成端到端模型的适应数据。在本文中，我们证明 RNN 传感器模型只需使用少量文本数据就可以有效地适应新领域。通过利用模型的固有结构，将预测网络解释为语言模型，我们可以对模型进行快速适应。调整模型避免了复杂的解码时间融合和外部语言模型的需要。使用适当的正则化，预测网络可以适应新的领域，同时仍然保留良好的泛化能力。我们通过多个 ASR 评估任务展示了该方法如何在目标任务 WER 中提供 10-45% 的相对增益。我们还分享了 RNN 传感器预测网络如何作为语言模型执行的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种仅使用文本数据快速适应RNN-Transducer预测网络的方法，无需外部语言模型或复杂解码融合。
AI.motivation: 端到端语音识别系统适应新领域通常依赖外部语言模型或TTS生成数据，流程复杂且效果受限。
AI.method: 利用RNN-Transducer预测网络本身作为语言模型的特性，通过文本数据微调并结合正则化技术实现快速领域适应。
AI.result: 在多个ASR任务中，目标任务词错误率（WER）相对降低10-45%，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过直接适配预测网络结构，简化了领域适应流程并提升了模型泛化能力，为文本驱动的模型优化提供了新思路。

search_text: Fast Text-Only Domain Adaptation of RNN-Transducer Prediction Network RNN-传感器预测网络的快速纯文本域适应 Adaption of end-to-end speech recognition systems to new tasks is known to be challenging. A number of solutions have been proposed which apply external language models with various fusion methods, possibly with a combination of two-pass decoding. Also TTS systems have been used to generate adaptation data for the end-to-end models. In this paper we show that RNN-transducer models can be effectively adapted to new domains using only small amounts of textual data. By taking advantage of model's inherent structure, where the prediction network is interpreted as a language model, we can apply fast adaptation to the model. Adapting the model avoids the need for complicated decoding time fusions and external language models. Using appropriate regularization, the prediction network can be adapted to new domains while still retaining good generalization capabilities. We show with multiple ASR evaluation tasks how this method can provide relative gains of 10-45% in target task WER. We also share insights how RNN-transducer prediction network performs as a language model. 众所周知，端到端语音识别系统适应新任务具有挑战性。已经提出了许多解决方案，这些解决方案将外部语言模型与各种融合方法一起应用，可能与两遍解码相结合。 TTS 系统也被用来生成端到端模型的适应数据。在本文中，我们证明 RNN 传感器模型只需使用少量文本数据就可以有效地适应新领域。通过利用模型的固有结构，将预测网络解释为语言模型，我们可以对模型进行快速适应。调整模型避免了复杂的解码时间融合和外部语言模型的需要。使用适当的正则化，预测网络可以适应新的领域，同时仍然保留良好的泛化能力。我们通过多个 ASR 评估任务展示了该方法如何在目标任务 WER 中提供 10-45% 的相对增益。我们还分享了 RNN 传感器预测网络如何作为语言模型执行的见解。 本文提出一种仅使用文本数据快速适应RNN-Transducer预测网络的方法，无需外部语言模型或复杂解码融合。 Janne Pylkkönen,Antti Ukkonen,Juho Kilpikoski,Samu Tamminen,Hannes Heikinheimo cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Hang Zhou,Yasheng Sun,Wayne Wu,Chen Change Loy,Xiaogang Wang,Ziwei Liu
title: Pose-Controllable Talking Face Generation by Implicitly Modularized Audio-Visual Representation
title_zh: 通过隐式模块化视听表示生成姿势可控的说话人脸
comment: Accepted to IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2021. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Hangz-nju-cuhk/Talking-Face_PC-AVS
comments: Accepted to IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2021. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Hangz-nju-cuhk/Talking-Face_PC-AVS
abstract: While accurate lip synchronization has been achieved for arbitrary-subject audio-driven talking face generation, the problem of how to efficiently drive the head pose remains. Previous methods rely on pre-estimated structural information such as landmarks and 3D parameters, aiming to generate personalized rhythmic movements. However, the inaccuracy of such estimated information under extreme conditions would lead to degradation problems. In this paper, we propose a clean yet effective framework to generate pose-controllable talking faces. We operate on raw face images, using only a single photo as an identity reference. The key is to modularize audio-visual representations by devising an implicit low-dimension pose code. Substantially, both speech content and head pose information lie in a joint non-identity embedding space. While speech content information can be defined by learning the intrinsic synchronization between audio-visual modalities, we identify that a pose code will be complementarily learned in a modulated convolution-based reconstruction framework. Extensive experiments show that our method generates accurately lip-synced talking faces whose poses are controllable by other videos. Moreover, our model has multiple advanced capabilities including extreme view robustness and talking face frontalization. Code, models, and demo videos are available at https://hangz-nju-cuhk.github.io/projects/PC-AVS.
summary: While accurate lip synchronization has been achieved for arbitrary-subject audio-driven talking face generation, the problem of how to efficiently drive the head pose remains. Previous methods rely on pre-estimated structural information such as landmarks and 3D parameters, aiming to generate personalized rhythmic movements. However, the inaccuracy of such estimated information under extreme conditions would lead to degradation problems. In this paper, we propose a clean yet effective framework to generate pose-controllable talking faces. We operate on raw face images, using only a single photo as an identity reference. The key is to modularize audio-visual representations by devising an implicit low-dimension pose code. Substantially, both speech content and head pose information lie in a joint non-identity embedding space. While speech content information can be defined by learning the intrinsic synchronization between audio-visual modalities, we identify that a pose code will be complementarily learned in a modulated convolution-based reconstruction framework. Extensive experiments show that our method generates accurately lip-synced talking faces whose poses are controllable by other videos. Moreover, our model has multiple advanced capabilities including extreme view robustness and talking face frontalization. Code, models, and demo videos are available at https://hangz-nju-cuhk.github.io/projects/PC-AVS.
abstract_zh: 虽然任意主体音频驱动的说话脸部生成已经实现了精确的唇形同步，但如何有效地驱动头部姿势的问题仍然存在。以前的方法依赖于预先估计的结构信息，例如地标和 3D 参数，旨在生成个性化的节奏运动。然而，在极端条件下这种估计信息的不准确会导致退化问题。在本文中，我们提出了一个干净而有效的框架来生成姿势可控的说话面孔。我们对原始面部图像进行操作，仅使用一张照片作为身份参考。关键是通过设计隐式低维姿势代码来模块化视听表示。实质上，语音内容和头部姿势信息都位于联合非身份嵌入空间中。虽然语音内容信息可以通过学习视听模态之间的内在同步来定义，但我们发现姿势代码将在基于调制卷积的重建框架中补充学习。大量实验表明，我们的方法可以生成准确的口型同步说话面孔，其姿势可由其他视频控制。此外，我们的模型具有多种高级功能，包括极端视图鲁棒性和说话脸部正面化。代码、模型和演示视频可在 https://hangz-nju-cuhk.github.io/projects/PC-AVS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过隐式模块化音视表示生成可控姿态的说话人脸的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖预估的结构信息（如关键点和3D参数）驱动头部姿态，但极端条件下预估信息不准确会导致生成质量下降。
AI.method: 基于原始人脸图像和单张照片作为身份参考，设计隐式低维姿态码，在调制卷积重建框架中互补学习语音内容与姿态信息。
AI.result: 生成的说话人脸实现精确唇形同步与姿态控制，具备极端视角鲁棒性和人脸正视化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需依赖预估结构信息，通过模块化音视表示实现了高效可控的说话人脸生成。

Extensive experiments show that our method generates accurately lip-synced talking faces whose poses are controllable by other videos. authors_text: Adrian Remonda,Sarah Krebs,Eduardo Veas,Granit Luzhnica,Roman Kern
title: Formula RL: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Racing using Telemetry Data
title_zh: Formula RL：使用遥测数据进行自主赛车的深度强化学习
comment: ef:IJCAI 2019 - Workshop on Scaling-Up Reinforcement Learning:SURL - Macau, China
comments: ef:IJCAI 2019 - Workshop on Scaling-Up Reinforcement Learning:SURL - Macau, China
abstract: This paper explores the use of reinforcement learning (RL) models for autonomous racing. In contrast to passenger cars, where safety is the top priority, a racing car aims to minimize the lap-time. We frame the problem as a reinforcement learning task with a multidimensional input consisting of the vehicle telemetry, and a continuous action space. To find out which RL methods better solve the problem and whether the obtained models generalize to driving on unknown tracks, we put 10 variants of deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) to race in two experiments: i)~studying how RL methods learn to drive a racing car and ii)~studying how the learning scenario influences the capability of the models to generalize. Our studies show that models trained with RL are not only able to drive faster than the baseline open source handcrafted bots but also generalize to unknown tracks.
summary: This paper explores the use of reinforcement learning (RL) models for autonomous racing. In contrast to passenger cars, where safety is the top priority, a racing car aims to minimize the lap-time. We frame the problem as a reinforcement learning task with a multidimensional input consisting of the vehicle telemetry, and a continuous action space. To find out which RL methods better solve the problem and whether the obtained models generalize to driving on unknown tracks, we put 10 variants of deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) to race in two experiments: i)~studying how RL methods learn to drive a racing car and ii)~studying how the learning scenario influences the capability of the models to generalize. Our studies show that models trained with RL are not only able to drive faster than the baseline open source handcrafted bots but also generalize to unknown tracks.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了强化学习（RL）模型在自动驾驶赛车中的应用。与安全为重中之重的乘用车不同，赛车的目标是尽量缩短单圈时间。我们将问题描述为强化学习任务，具有由车辆遥测和连续动作空间组成的多维输入。为了找出哪些 RL 方法可以更好地解决问题以及所获得的模型是否能够泛化到未知赛道上的驾驶，我们在两个实验中使用了 10 种深度确定性策略梯度 (DDPG) 变体来进行比赛：i)~研究 RL 方法如何学习驾驶赛车，ii)~研究学习场景如何影响模型的泛化能力。我们的研究表明，用强化学习训练的模型不仅能够比基线开源手工机器人行驶得更快，而且还可以推广到未知的轨道。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用深度强化学习方法通过车辆遥测数据实现自动驾驶赛车，旨在优化圈速并验证模型在未知赛道的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 赛车需以最短时间完成 lap，而传统手工编写控制器可能无法达到最优性能，需探索强化学习方法的潜力及其泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用10种深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）变体，在两个实验中对比不同RL方法的学习效果及训练场景对模型泛化能力的影响。
AI.result: 训练的RL模型在速度上超越基准开源控制器，并成功泛化到未知赛道。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习能有效解决自动驾驶赛车问题，且模型具备跨赛道的泛化能力，未来可进一步优化算法与训练策略。

authors_text: Miłosz Stypiński,Marcin Niemiec
title: Synchronization of Tree Parity Machines using non-binary input vectors
title_zh: 使用非二进制输入向量同步树奇偶校验机
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Neural cryptography is the application of artificial neural networks in the subject of cryptography. The functionality of this solution is based on a tree parity machine. It uses artificial neural networks to perform secure key exchange between network entities. This article proposes improvements to the synchronization of two tree parity machines. The improvement is based on learning artificial neural network using input vectors which have a wider range of values than binary ones. As a result, the duration of the synchronization process is reduced. Therefore, tree parity machines achieve common weights in a shorter time due to the reduction of necessary bit exchanges. This approach improves the security of neural cryptography
summary: Neural cryptography is the application of artificial neural networks in the subject of cryptography. The functionality of this solution is based on a tree parity machine. It uses artificial neural networks to perform secure key exchange between network entities. This article proposes improvements to the synchronization of two tree parity machines. The improvement is based on learning artificial neural network using input vectors which have a wider range of values than binary ones. As a result, the duration of the synchronization process is reduced. Therefore, tree parity machines achieve common weights in a shorter time due to the reduction of necessary bit exchanges. This approach improves the security of neural cryptography
abstract_zh: 神经密码学是人工神经网络在密码学学科中的应用。该解决方案的功能基于树奇偶校验机。它使用人工神经网络在网络实体之间执行安全密钥交换。本文提出了对两台树奇偶校验机同步的改进。该改进基于使用输入向量学习人工神经网络，该输入向量具有比二进制向量更广泛的值范围。结果，减少了同步过程的持续时间。因此，由于减少了必要的比特交换，树奇偶校验机在更短的时间内实现了共同的权重。这种方法提高了神经密码学的安全性

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过使用非二进制输入向量改进树奇偶机的同步过程，以缩短同步时间并提高神经密码学的安全性。
AI.motivation: 传统树奇偶机同步过程因依赖二进制输入向量导致同步时间较长，需减少比特交换次数以提升效率与安全性。
AI.method: 采用非二进制输入向量训练人工神经网络，扩展输入值范围，优化权重同步机制。
AI.result: 同步过程所需时间减少，树奇偶机更快达成共同权重，降低通信开销。
AI.conclusion: 非二进制输入向量有效提升神经密码学的同步效率与安全性。

search_text: Synchronization of Tree Parity Machines using non-binary input vectors 使用非二进制输入向量同步树奇偶校验机 Neural cryptography is the application of artificial neural networks in the subject of cryptography. The functionality of this solution is based on a tree parity machine. It uses artificial neural networks to perform secure key exchange between network entities. This article proposes improvements to the synchronization of two tree parity machines. The improvement is based on learning artificial neural network using input vectors which have a wider range of values than binary ones. As a result, the duration of the synchronization process is reduced. Therefore, tree parity machines achieve common weights in a shorter time due to the reduction of necessary bit exchanges. This approach improves the security of neural cryptography 神经密码学是人工神经网络在密码学学科中的应用。该解决方案的功能基于树奇偶校验机。它使用人工神经网络在网络实体之间执行安全密钥交换。本文提出了对两台树奇偶校验机同步的改进。该改进基于使用输入向量学习人工神经网络，该输入向量具有比二进制向量更广泛的值范围。结果，减少了同步过程的持续时间。因此，由于减少了必要的比特交换，树奇偶校验机在更短的时间内实现了共同的权重。这种方法提高了神经密码学的安全性 本文提出通过使用非二进制输入向量改进树奇偶机的同步过程，以缩短同步时间并提高神经密码学的安全性。 Miłosz Stypiński,Marcin Niemiec cs.CR,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Arman Maesumi,Mingkang Zhu,Yi Wang,Tianlong Chen,Zhangyang Wang,Chandrajit Bajaj
title: Learning Transferable 3D Adversarial Cloaks for Deep Trained Detectors
title_zh: 学习用于深度训练探测器的可转移 3D 对抗斗篷
abstract: This paper presents a novel patch-based adversarial attack pipeline that trains adversarial patches on 3D human meshes. We sample triangular faces on a reference human mesh, and create an adversarial texture atlas over those faces. The adversarial texture is transferred to human meshes in various poses, which are rendered onto a collection of real-world background images. Contrary to the traditional patch-based adversarial attacks, where prior work attempts to fool trained object detectors using appended adversarial patches, this new form of attack is mapped into the 3D object world and back-propagated to the texture atlas through differentiable rendering. As such, the adversarial patch is trained under deformation consistent with real-world materials. In addition, and unlike existing adversarial patches, our new 3D adversarial patch is shown to fool state-of-the-art deep object detectors robustly under varying views, potentially leading to an attacking scheme that is persistently strong in the physical world.
summary: This paper presents a novel patch-based adversarial attack pipeline that trains adversarial patches on 3D human meshes. We sample triangular faces on a reference human mesh, and create an adversarial texture atlas over those faces. The adversarial texture is transferred to human meshes in various poses, which are rendered onto a collection of real-world background images. Contrary to the traditional patch-based adversarial attacks, where prior work attempts to fool trained object detectors using appended adversarial patches, this new form of attack is mapped into the 3D object world and back-propagated to the texture atlas through differentiable rendering. As such, the adversarial patch is trained under deformation consistent with real-world materials. In addition, and unlike existing adversarial patches, our new 3D adversarial patch is shown to fool state-of-the-art deep object detectors robustly under varying views, potentially leading to an attacking scheme that is persistently strong in the physical world.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的基于补丁的对抗性攻击管道，可在 3D 人体网格上训练对抗性补丁。我们在参考人体网格上对三角形面部进行采样，并在这些面部上创建对抗性纹理图集。对抗性纹理被转移到各种姿势的人体网格上，这些网格被渲染到现实世界背景图像的集合上。与传统的基于补丁的对抗性攻击相反，先前的工作试图使用附加的对抗性补丁来欺骗训练有素的对象检测器，这种新形式的攻击被映射到 3D 对象世界，并通过可微渲染反向传播到纹理图集。因此，对抗性补丁是在与真实世界材料一致的变形下进行训练的。此外，与现有的对抗性补丁不同，我们的新 3D 对抗性补丁可以在不同的视图下稳健地愚弄最先进的深度对象检测器，从而可能导致在物理世界中持续强大的攻击方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于3D人体网格的新型补丁式对抗攻击方法，能够生成可转移的对抗性纹理，以欺骗深度训练的检测器。
AI.motivation: 传统的对抗补丁攻击方法在物理世界中效果有限，无法适应不同视角和形变。因此，本文旨在开发一种在3D空间中生成对抗补丁的方法，使其在不同视角和形变下仍能有效欺骗检测器。
AI.method: 本文通过在参考人体网格上采样三角形面片，创建对抗性纹理图集，并将其转移到不同姿态的人体网格上。然后，利用可微渲染技术将对抗性纹理渲染到真实背景图像中，并通过反向传播优化纹理图集。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法生成的3D对抗补丁能够在不同视角下有效欺骗最先进的深度目标检测器，且具有较强的物理世界攻击能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种新的3D对抗补丁生成方法，能够生成在不同视角和形变下都具有强攻击性的对抗性纹理，为物理世界中的对抗攻击提供了新的思路。

authors_text: Bin Jiang,Chris de Rijke
title: Structural Beauty: A Structure-based Approach to Quantifying the Beauty of an Image
title_zh: 结构美：一种基于结构的量化图像美的方法
abstract: To say that beauty is in the eye of the beholder means that beauty is largely subjective so varies from person to person. While the subjectivity view is commonly held, there is also an objectivity view that seeks to measure beauty or aesthetics in some quantitative manners. Christopher Alexander has long discovered that beauty or coherence highly correlates to the number of subsymmetries or substructures and demonstrated that there is a shared notion of beauty - structural beauty - among people and even different peoples, regardless of their faiths, cultures, and ethnicities. This notion of structural beauty arises directly out of living structure or wholeness, a physical and mathematical structure that underlies all space and matter. Based on the concept of living structure, this paper develops an approach for computing the structural beauty or life of an image (L) based on the number of automatically derived substructures (S) and their inherent hierarchy (H). To verify this approach, we conducted a series of case studies applied to eight pairs of images including Leonardo da Vinci's Mona Lisa and Jackson Pollock's Blue Poles. We discovered among others that Blue Poles is more structurally beautiful than the Mona Lisa, and traditional buildings are in general more structurally beautiful than their modernist counterparts. This finding implies that goodness of things or images is largely a matter of fact rather than an opinion or personal preference as conventionally conceived. The research on structural beauty has deep implications on many disciplines, where beauty or aesthetics is a major concern such as image understanding and computer vision, architecture and urban design, humanities and arts, neurophysiology, and psychology. Keywords: Life; wholeness; figural goodness; head/tail breaks; computer vision
summary: To say that beauty is in the eye of the beholder means that beauty is largely subjective so varies from person to person. While the subjectivity view is commonly held, there is also an objectivity view that seeks to measure beauty or aesthetics in some quantitative manners. Christopher Alexander has long discovered that beauty or coherence highly correlates to the number of subsymmetries or substructures and demonstrated that there is a shared notion of beauty - structural beauty - among people and even different peoples, regardless of their faiths, cultures, and ethnicities. This notion of structural beauty arises directly out of living structure or wholeness, a physical and mathematical structure that underlies all space and matter. Based on the concept of living structure, this paper develops an approach for computing the structural beauty or life of an image (L) based on the number of automatically derived substructures (S) and their inherent hierarchy (H). To verify this approach, we conducted a series of case studies applied to eight pairs of images including Leonardo da Vinci's Mona Lisa and Jackson Pollock's Blue Poles. We discovered among others that Blue Poles is more structurally beautiful than the Mona Lisa, and traditional buildings are in general more structurally beautiful than their modernist counterparts. This finding implies that goodness of things or images is largely a matter of fact rather than an opinion or personal preference as conventionally conceived. The research on structural beauty has deep implications on many disciplines, where beauty or aesthetics is a major concern such as image understanding and computer vision, architecture and urban design, humanities and arts, neurophysiology, and psychology. Keywords: Life; wholeness; figural goodness; head/tail breaks; computer vision
abstract_zh: 说情人眼里出西施，意味着美在很大程度上是主观的，因此因人而异。虽然人们普遍持有主观性观点，但也有一种客观性观点，旨在以某种定量方式衡量美或美学。克里斯托弗·亚历山大（Christopher Alexander）早就发现，美或连贯性与亚对称或亚结构的数量高度相关，并证明人们甚至不同民族之间存在着共同的美概念——结构美，无论其信仰、文化和种族如何。这种结构美的概念直接源于生命结构或整体性，是所有空间和物质基础的物理和数学结构。基于生命结构的概念，本文开发了一种基于自动导出的子结构（S）的数量及其固有层次结构（H）来计算图像（L）的结构美或生命的方法。为了验证这种方法，我们对八对图像进行了一系列案例研究，包括达芬奇的《蒙娜丽莎》和杰克逊·波洛克的《蓝杆》。我们发现，蓝杆在结构上比蒙娜丽莎更加美丽，而传统建筑总体上比现代主义建筑在结构上更加美丽。这一发现意味着事物或图像的美好很大程度上取决于事实，而不是传统观念中的观点或个人偏好。结构美的研究对许多学科具有深远的影响，其中美或美学是主要关注点，例如图像理解和计算机视觉、建筑和城市设计、人文和艺术、神经生理学和心理学。关键词：生活；完整性；形象上的善良；头/尾断裂；计算机视觉

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图像结构的量化方法，用于计算图像的结构性美感（生命值L），通过分析子结构数量（S）及其层次（H）。
AI.motivation: 尽管美感常被视为主观，但作者认为存在客观的结构性美感，可通过数学和物理结构（如生命结构）进行量化，以超越个人偏好差异。
AI.method: 基于克里斯托弗·亚历山大提出的‘生命结构’理论，通过自动提取图像子结构数量及其层次关系，建立计算生命值（L）的模型，并通过案例研究验证。
AI.result: 发现波洛克的《蓝极》比达芬奇的《蒙娜丽莎》更具结构性美感，传统建筑普遍优于现代主义建筑，表明美感具有客观事实属性。
AI.conclusion: 结构性美感的研究为图像理解、建筑、艺术等领域提供客观量化依据，挑战传统‘美感是主观意见’的观点，具有跨学科重要意义。

ai_content_json.method: 基于克里斯托弗·亚历山大提出的‘生命结构’理论，通过自动提取图像子结构数量及其层次关系，建立计算生命值（L）的模型，并通过案例研究验证。
ai_content_json.result: 发现波洛克的《蓝极》比达芬奇的《蒙娜丽莎》更具结构性美感，传统建筑普遍优于现代主义建筑，表明美感具有客观事实属性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 结构性美感的研究为图像理解、建筑、艺术等领域提供客观量化依据，挑战传统‘美感是主观意见’的观点，具有跨学科重要意义。
