search_text: Structural Beauty: A Structure-based Approach to Quantifying the Beauty of an Image 结构美：一种基于结构的量化图像美的方法 To say that beauty is in the eye of the beholder means that beauty is largely subjective so varies from person to person. While the subjectivity view is commonly held, there is also an objectivity view that seeks to measure beauty or aesthetics in some quantitative manners. Christopher Alexander has long discovered that beauty or coherence highly correlates to the number of subsymmetries or substructures and demonstrated that there is a shared notion of beauty - structural beauty - among people and even different peoples, regardless of their faiths, cultures, and ethnicities. This notion of structural beauty arises directly out of living structure or wholeness, a physical and mathematical structure that underlies all space and matter. Based on the concept of living structure, this paper develops an approach for computing the structural beauty or life of an image (L) based on the number of automatically derived substructures (S) and their inherent hierarchy (H). To verify this approach, we conducted a series of case studies applied to eight pairs of images including Leonardo da Vinci's Mona Lisa and Jackson Pollock's Blue Poles. We discovered among others that Blue Poles is more structurally beautiful than the Mona Lisa, and traditional buildings are in general more structurally beautiful than their modernist counterparts. This finding implies that goodness of things or images is largely a matter of fact rather than an opinion or personal preference as conventionally conceived. The research on structural beauty has deep implications on many disciplines, where beauty or aesthetics is a major concern such as image understanding and computer vision, architecture and urban design, humanities and arts, neurophysiology, and psychology. Keywords: Life; wholeness; figural goodness; head/tail breaks; computer vision 说情人眼里出西施，意味着美在很大程度上是主观的，因此因人而异。虽然人们普遍持有主观性观点，但也有一种客观性观点，旨在以某种定量方式衡量美或美学。克里斯托弗·亚历山大（Christopher Alexander）早就发现，美或连贯性与亚对称或亚结构的数量高度相关，并证明人们甚至不同民族之间存在着共同的美概念——结构美，无论其信仰、文化和种族如何。这种结构美的概念直接源于生命结构或整体性，是所有空间和物质基础的物理和数学结构。基于生命结构的概念，本文开发了一种基于自动导出的子结构（S）的数量及其固有层次结构（H）来计算图像（L）的结构美或生命的方法。为了验证这种方法，我们对八对图像进行了一系列案例研究，包括达芬奇的《蒙娜丽莎》和杰克逊·波洛克的《蓝杆》。我们发现，蓝杆在结构上比蒙娜丽莎更加美丽，而传统建筑总体上比现代主义建筑在结构上更加美丽。这一发现意味着事物或图像的美好很大程度上取决于事实，而不是传统观念中的观点或个人偏好。结构美的研究对许多学科具有深远的影响，其中美或美学是主要关注点，例如图像理解和计算机视觉、建筑和城市设计、人文和艺术、神经生理学和心理学。关键词：生活；完整性；形象上的善良；头/尾断裂；计算机视觉 本文提出一种基于图像结构的量化方法，用于计算图像的结构性美感（生命值L），通过分析子结构数量（S）及其层次（H）。 Bin Jiang,Chris de Rijke physics.soc-ph,cs.CV

authors_text: Aydin Buluc,Tamara G. Kolda,Stefan M. Wild,Mihai Anitescu,Anthony DeGennaro,John Jakeman,Chandrika Kamath,Ramakrishnan Kannan,Miles E. Lopes,Per-Gunnar Martinsson,Kary Myers,Jelani Nelson,Juan M. Restrepo,C. Seshadhri,Draguna Vrabie,Brendt Wohlberg,Stephen J. Wright,Chao Yang,Peter Zwart
title: Randomized Algorithms for Scientific Computing (RASC)
title_zh: 科学计算随机算法 (RASC)
abstract: Randomized algorithms have propelled advances in artificial intelligence and represent a foundational research area in advancing AI for Science. Future advancements in DOE Office of Science priority areas such as climate science, astrophysics, fusion, advanced materials, combustion, and quantum computing all require randomized algorithms for surmounting challenges of complexity, robustness, and scalability. This report summarizes the outcomes of that workshop, "Randomized Algorithms for Scientific Computing (RASC)," held virtually across four days in December 2020 and January 2021.
summary: Randomized algorithms have propelled advances in artificial intelligence and represent a foundational research area in advancing AI for Science. Future advancements in DOE Office of Science priority areas such as climate science, astrophysics, fusion, advanced materials, combustion, and quantum computing all require randomized algorithms for surmounting challenges of complexity, robustness, and scalability. This report summarizes the outcomes of that workshop, "Randomized Algorithms for Scientific Computing (RASC)," held virtually across four days in December 2020 and January 2021.
abstract_zh: 随机算法推动了人工智能的进步，并代表了推进人工智能科学发展的基础研究领域。美国能源部科学办公室优先领域（例如气候科学、天体物理学、聚变、先进材料、燃烧和量子计算）的未来进步都需要随机算法来克服复杂性、鲁棒性和可扩展性的挑战。本报告总结了“科学计算随机算法 (RASC)”研讨会的成果，该研讨会于 2020 年 12 月至 2021 年 1 月举行，历时四天。

AI.tldr: 本文总结了'RASC'研讨会成果，探讨随机化算法在科学计算中的应用与挑战。
AI.motivation: 随机化算法是推动人工智能和科学计算发展的基础，未来科学领域需其解决复杂性、鲁棒性和可扩展性问题。
AI.method: 通过虚拟研讨会形式，汇集多领域专家讨论算法在气候科学、量子计算等领域的应用与技术难点。
AI.result: 明确了随机化算法在多个科学领域的关键作用，识别了当前技术瓶颈并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 随机化算法对科学计算至关重要，需持续研究与跨学科合作以推动其在复杂科学问题中的应用。

authors_text: P. A. Grudniewski,A. J. Sobey
title: cMLSGA: A Co-Evolutionary Multi-Level Selection Genetic Algorithm for Multi-Objective Optimization
title_zh: cMLSGA：一种用于多目标优化的协同进化多级选择遗传算法
comment: 35 pages, 3 figures, 7 tables. The associated code is available online with detailed instructions at: https://www.bitbucket.org/Pag1c18
comments: 35 pages, 3 figures, 7 tables. The associated code is available online with detailed instructions at: https://www.bitbucket.org/Pag1c18
abstract: In practical optimisation the dominant characteristics of the problem are often not known prior. Therefore, there is a need to develop general solvers as it is not always possible to tailor a specialised approach to each application. The hybrid form of Multi-Level Selection Genetic Algorithm (MLSGA) already shows good performance on range of problems due to its diversity-first approach, which is rare among Evolutionary Algorithms. To increase the generality of its performance this paper proposes a distinct set of co-evolutionary mechanisms, which defines co-evolution as competition between collectives rather than individuals. This distinctive approach to co-evolutionary provides less regular communication between sub-populations and different fitness definitions between individuals and collectives. This encourages the collectives to act more independently creating a unique sub-regional search, leading to the development of co-evolutionary MLSGA (cMLSGA). To test this methodology nine genetic algorithms are selected to generate several variants of cMLSGA, which incorporates these approaches at the individual level. The new mechanisms are tested on over 100 different functions and benchmarked against the 9 state-of-the-art competitors in order to find the best general solver. The results show that the diversity of co-evolutionary approaches is more important than their individual performances. This allows the selection of two competing algorithms that improve the generality of cMLSGA, without large loss of performance on any specific problem type. When compared to the state-of-the-art, the proposed methodology is the most universal and robust, leading to an algorithm more likely to solve complex problems with limited knowledge about the search space.
summary: In practical optimisation the dominant characteristics of the problem are often not known prior. Therefore, there is a need to develop general solvers as it is not always possible to tailor a specialised approach to each application. The hybrid form of Multi-Level Selection Genetic Algorithm (MLSGA) already shows good performance on range of problems due to its diversity-first approach, which is rare among Evolutionary Algorithms. To increase the generality of its performance this paper proposes a distinct set of co-evolutionary mechanisms, which defines co-evolution as competition between collectives rather than individuals. This distinctive approach to co-evolutionary provides less regular communication between sub-populations and different fitness definitions between individuals and collectives. This encourages the collectives to act more independently creating a unique sub-regional search, leading to the development of co-evolutionary MLSGA (cMLSGA). To test this methodology nine genetic algorithms are selected to generate several variants of cMLSGA, which incorporates these approaches at the individual level. The new mechanisms are tested on over 100 different functions and benchmarked against the 9 state-of-the-art competitors in order to find the best general solver. The results show that the diversity of co-evolutionary approaches is more important than their individual performances. This allows the selection of two competing algorithms that improve the generality of cMLSGA, without large loss of performance on any specific problem type. When compared to the state-of-the-art, the proposed methodology is the most universal and robust, leading to an algorithm more likely to solve complex problems with limited knowledge about the search space.
abstract_zh: 在实际优化中，问题的主要特征通常是事先未知的。因此，需要开发通用求解器，因为并不总是可以为每个应用定制专门的方法。多级选择遗传算法（MLSGA）的混合形式由于其多样性优先的方法已经在一系列问题上表现出了良好的性能，这在进化算法中是罕见的。为了增加其表现的普遍性，本文提出了一套独特的共同进化机制，它将共同进化定义为集体而不是个人之间的竞争。这种独特的共同进化方法提供了亚群体之间较少的定期交流以及个人和集体之间不同的适应度定义。这鼓励集体更加独立地行动，创建独特的次区域搜索，从而导致共同进化 MLSGA (cMLSGA) 的发展。为了测试这种方法，选择了九种遗传算法来生成 cMLSGA 的几种变体，其中在个体级别合并了这些方法。新机制在 100 多种不同的函数上进行了测试，并与 9 个最先进的竞争对手进行了基准测试，以找到最佳的通用求解器。结果表明，共同进化方法的多样性比其个体表现更重要。这允许选择两种竞争算法来提高 cMLSGA 的通用性，而不会在任何特定问题类型上造成较大的性能损失。与最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法是最通用和最稳健的，使得算法更有可能在搜索空间知识有限的情况下解决复杂问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为cMLSGA的协同进化多级选择遗传算法，旨在解决多目标优化问题，提升算法在未知问题特性下的通用性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 实际优化问题的特性通常未知，难以针对每个应用定制专用方法。现有MLSGA虽表现良好，但需进一步提升通用性以适应更广泛的问题场景。
AI.method: 通过引入集体间竞争的协同进化机制，替代个体间竞争，减少子种群间通信频率并采用差异化的适应度定义，构建cMLSGA。通过九种变体在100多个函数上测试，并与九种前沿算法对比验证。
AI.result: 协同进化方法的多样性比单一性能更重要，选取两种算法在提升通用性的同时仅轻微牺牲特定问题性能。cMLSGA在通用性和鲁棒性上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: cMLSGA通过协同进化机制成为最通用且稳健的求解器，适用于复杂问题且无需充分了解搜索空间先验知识。

The results show that the diversity of co-evolutionary approaches is more important than their individual performances. This allows the selection of two competing algorithms that improve the generality of cMLSGA, without large loss of performance on any specific problem type. When compared to the state-of-the-art, the proposed methodology is the most universal and robust, leading to an algorithm more likely to solve complex problems with limited knowledge about the search space. 在实际优化中，问题的主要特征通常是事先未知的。因此，需要开发通用求解器，因为并不总是可以为每个应用定制专门的方法。多级选择遗传算法（MLSGA）的混合形式由于其多样性优先的方法已经在一系列问题上表现出了良好的性能，这在进化算法中是罕见的。为了增加其表现的普遍性，本文提出了一套独特的共同进化机制，它将共同进化定义为集体而不是个人之间的竞争。这种独特的共同进化方法提供了亚群体之间较少的定期交流以及个人和集体之间不同的适应度定义。这鼓励集体更加独立地行动，创建独特的次区域搜索，从而导致共同进化 MLSGA (cMLSGA) 的发展。为了测试这种方法，选择了九种遗传算法来生成 cMLSGA 的几种变体，其中在个体级别合并了这些方法。新机制在 100 多种不同的函数上进行了测试，并与 9 个最先进的竞争对手进行了基准测试，以找到最佳的通用求解器。结果表明，共同进化方法的多样性比其个体表现更重要。这允许选择两种竞争算法来提高 cMLSGA 的通用性，而不会在任何特定问题类型上造成较大的性能损失。与最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法是最通用和最稳健的，使得算法更有可能在搜索空间知识有限的情况下解决复杂问题。 本文提出了一种名为cMLSGA的协同进化多级选择遗传算法，旨在解决多目标优化问题，提升算法在未知问题特性下的通用性和鲁棒性。 P. A. Grudniewski,A. J. Sobey cs.NE

authors_text: Ashish Shenoy,Sravan Bodapati,Monica Sunkara,Srikanth Ronanki,Katrin Kirchhoff
title: Adapting Long Context NLM for ASR Rescoring in Conversational Agents
title_zh: 采用长上下文 NLM 在会话代理中进行 ASR 重新评分
comment: Accepted to Interspeech 2021. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2103.10325
comments: Accepted to Interspeech 2021. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2103.10325
abstract: Neural Language Models (NLM), when trained and evaluated with context spanning multiple utterances, have been shown to consistently outperform both conventional n-gram language models and NLMs that use limited context. In this paper, we investigate various techniques to incorporate turn based context history into both recurrent (LSTM) and Transformer-XL based NLMs. For recurrent based NLMs, we explore context carry over mechanism and feature based augmentation, where we incorporate other forms of contextual information such as bot response and system dialogue acts as classified by a Natural Language Understanding (NLU) model. To mitigate the sharp nearby, fuzzy far away problem with contextual NLM, we propose the use of attention layer over lexical metadata to improve feature based augmentation. Additionally, we adapt our contextual NLM towards user provided on-the-fly speech patterns by leveraging encodings from a large pre-trained masked language model and performing fusion with a Transformer-XL based NLM. We test our proposed models using N-best rescoring of ASR hypotheses of task-oriented dialogues and also evaluate on downstream NLU tasks such as intent classification and slot labeling. The best performing model shows a relative WER between 1.6% and 9.1% and a slot labeling F1 score improvement of 4% over non-contextual baselines.
summary: Neural Language Models (NLM), when trained and evaluated with context spanning multiple utterances, have been shown to consistently outperform both conventional n-gram language models and NLMs that use limited context. In this paper, we investigate various techniques to incorporate turn based context history into both recurrent (LSTM) and Transformer-XL based NLMs. For recurrent based NLMs, we explore context carry over mechanism and feature based augmentation, where we incorporate other forms of contextual information such as bot response and system dialogue acts as classified by a Natural Language Understanding (NLU) model. To mitigate the sharp nearby, fuzzy far away problem with contextual NLM, we propose the use of attention layer over lexical metadata to improve feature based augmentation. Additionally, we adapt our contextual NLM towards user provided on-the-fly speech patterns by leveraging encodings from a large pre-trained masked language model and performing fusion with a Transformer-XL based NLM. We test our proposed models using N-best rescoring of ASR hypotheses of task-oriented dialogues and also evaluate on downstream NLU tasks such as intent classification and slot labeling. The best performing model shows a relative WER between 1.6% and 9.1% and a slot labeling F1 score improvement of 4% over non-contextual baselines.
abstract_zh: 神经语言模型 (NLM) 在使用跨越多个话语的上下文进行训练和评估时，已被证明始终优于传统的 n-gram 语言模型和使用有限上下文的 NLM。在本文中，我们研究了将基于回合的上下文历史合并到基于循环 (LSTM) 和基于 Transformer-XL 的 NLM 中的各种技术。对于基于循环的 NLM，我们探索了上下文继承机制和基于特征的增强，其中我们合并了其他形式的上下文信息，例如由自然语言理解（NLU）模型分类的机器人响应和系统对话行为。为了缓解上下文 NLM 中近处尖锐、远处模糊的问题，我们建议在词汇元数据上使用注意力层来改进基于特征的增强。此外，我们通过利用大型预训练掩码语言模型的编码并与基于 Transformer-XL 的 NLM 进行融合，使上下文 NLM 适应用户提供的即时语音模式。我们使用面向任务的对话的 ASR 假设的 N 最佳重新评分来测试我们提出的模型，并评估下游 NLU 任务，例如意图分类和槽标记。表现最佳的模型显示相对 WER 在 1.6% 到 9.1% 之间，槽位标记 F1 分数比非上下文基线提高了 4%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何将长上下文神经语言模型（NLM）应用于对话代理中的语音识别（ASR）重排序，以提升对话系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统n-gram语言模型和短上下文NLM在处理多轮对话时表现不足，而长上下文NLM能更好捕捉对话历史信息，从而提升ASR和自然语言理解（NLU）任务的效果。
AI.method: 针对循环神经网络（LSTM）和Transformer-XL模型，提出上下文传递机制与特征增强方法，结合NLU模型的对话状态信息；通过注意力层优化特征增强，并融合预训练语言模型的编码以适应实时语音模式。
AI.result: 实验表明，最佳模型在任务型对话的ASR重排序中相对词错误率（WER）降低1.6%-9.1%，槽位标注F1分数较非上下文基线提升4%。
AI.conclusion: 长上下文NLM能有效提升ASR重排序和下游NLU任务性能，证明了在对话代理中利用多轮对话历史信息的重要性。

authors_text: Ulrike Barthelmeß,Ulrich Furbach
title: Künstliche Intelligenz, quo vadis?
title_zh: 艺术智能，何去何从？
abstract: This paper outlines the state of the art in AI. It then describes basic machine learning and knowledge processing techniques. Based on this, some possibilities and limitations of future AI developments are discussed.
summary: This paper outlines the state of the art in AI. It then describes basic machine learning and knowledge processing techniques. Based on this, some possibilities and limitations of future AI developments are discussed.
abstract_zh: 本文概述了人工智能的最新技术水平。然后描述基本的机器学习和知识处理技术。在此基础上，讨论了未来人工智能发展的一些可能性和局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文概述了人工智能领域的最新进展，并探讨了未来发展的可能性与局限性。
AI.motivation: 旨在为读者提供人工智能技术的全面概览，并为未来研究方向提供参考。
AI.method: 通过梳理当前人工智能的核心技术（如机器学习与知识处理），结合现有研究成果进行分析。
AI.result: 明确了人工智能在技术突破与应用扩展上的潜力，同时指出了计算能力、数据依赖性及伦理问题等限制因素。
AI.conclusion: 人工智能未来需在技术创新与伦理框架之间寻求平衡，以实现可持续发展。

authors_text: Zongyuan Shen,James P. Wilson,Ryan Harvey,Shalabh Gupta
title: MRRT: Multiple Rapidly-Exploring Random Trees for Fast Online Replanning in Dynamic Environments
title_zh: MRRT：用于动态环境中快速在线重新规划的多个快速探索随机树
abstract: This paper presents a novel algorithm, called MRRT, which uses multiple rapidly-exploring random trees for fast online replanning of autonomous vehicles in dynamic environments with moving obstacles. The proposed algorithm is built upon the RRT algorithm with a multi-tree structure. At the beginning, the RRT algorithm is applied to find the initial solution based on partial knowledge of the environment. Then, the robot starts to execute this path. At each iteration, the new obstacle configurations are collected by the robot's sensor and used to replan the path. This new information can come from unknown static obstacles (e.g., seafloor layout) as well as moving obstacles. Then, to accommodate the environmental changes, two procedures are adopted: 1) edge pruning, and 2) tree regrowing. Specifically, the edge pruning procedure checks the collision status through the tree and only removes the invalid edges while maintaining the tree structure of already-explored regions. Due to removal of invalid edges, the tree could be broken into multiple disjoint trees. As such, the RRT algorithm is applied to regrow the trees. Specifically, a sample is created randomly and joined to all the disjoint trees in its local neighborhood by connecting to the nearest nodes. Finally, a new solution is found for the robot. The advantages of the proposed MRRT algorithm are as follows: i) retains the maximal tree structure by only pruning the edges which collide with the obstacles, ii) guarantees probabilistic completeness, and iii) is computational efficient for fast replanning since all disjoint trees are maintained for future connections and expanded simultaneously.
summary: This paper presents a novel algorithm, called MRRT, which uses multiple rapidly-exploring random trees for fast online replanning of autonomous vehicles in dynamic environments with moving obstacles. The proposed algorithm is built upon the RRT algorithm with a multi-tree structure. At the beginning, the RRT algorithm is applied to find the initial solution based on partial knowledge of the environment. Then, the robot starts to execute this path. At each iteration, the new obstacle configurations are collected by the robot's sensor and used to replan the path. This new information can come from unknown static obstacles (e.g., seafloor layout) as well as moving obstacles. Then, to accommodate the environmental changes, two procedures are adopted: 1) edge pruning, and 2) tree regrowing. Specifically, the edge pruning procedure checks the collision status through the tree and only removes the invalid edges while maintaining the tree structure of already-explored regions. Due to removal of invalid edges, the tree could be broken into multiple disjoint trees. As such, the RRT algorithm is applied to regrow the trees. Specifically, a sample is created randomly and joined to all the disjoint trees in its local neighborhood by connecting to the nearest nodes. Finally, a new solution is found for the robot. The advantages of the proposed MRRT algorithm are as follows: i) retains the maximal tree structure by only pruning the edges which collide with the obstacles, ii) guarantees probabilistic completeness, and iii) is computational efficient for fast replanning since all disjoint trees are maintained for future connections and expanded simultaneously.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种名为 MRRT 的新颖算法，该算法使用多个快速探索的随机树在有移动障碍物的动态环境中快速在线重新规划自动驾驶车辆。所提出的算法建立在具有多树结构的RRT算法的基础上。首先，应用RRT算法基于部分环境知识来寻找初始解。然后，机器人开始执行该路径。在每次迭代中，机器人的传感器都会收集新的障碍物配置并用于重新规划路径。这些新信息可以来自未知的静态障碍物（例如海底布局）以及移动障碍物。然后，为了适应环境变化，采用了两个过程：1）边缘修剪，2）树木重新生长。具体来说，边缘修剪过程通过树检查碰撞状态，并且仅删除无效边缘，同时保持已探索区域的树结构。由于删除了无效边，树可能会被分成多个不相交的树。因此，应用 RRT 算法来重新生长树木。具体来说，样本是随机创建的，并通过连接到最近的节点来连接到其本地邻域中的所有不相交树。最终，为机器人找到了新的解决方案。所提出的 MRRT 算法的优点如下：i）仅通过修剪与障碍物碰撞的边缘来保留最大树结构，ii）保证概率完整性，以及 iii）计算效率高，可快速重新规划，因为所有不相交的树都为未来的连接而维护并同时扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MRRT的新算法，利用多棵快速探索随机树（RRT）实现动态环境中自主车辆的快速在线路径重规划。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划方法在动态障碍物环境中难以高效重规划，需兼顾实时性和计算效率。
AI.method: 基于RRT算法构建多树结构，通过边剪枝和树再生处理环境变化：1) 剪除碰撞边保留树结构，2) 对离散树进行随机采样并局部连接，实现多树同步扩展。
AI.result: MRRT算法在保留最大树结构的同时保证概率完备性，通过维护离散树实现高效重规划，适用于静态与动态障碍物混合场景。
AI.conclusion: MRRT通过分阶段处理环境变化和多树并行扩展，在动态环境中实现了计算效率与路径可行性的平衡，适用于自主车辆实时导航。

search_text: MRRT: Multiple Rapidly-Exploring Random Trees for Fast Online Replanning in Dynamic Environments MRRT：用于动态环境中快速在线重新规划的多个快速探索随机树 This paper presents a novel algorithm, called MRRT, which uses multiple rapidly-exploring random trees for fast online replanning of autonomous vehicles in dynamic environments with moving obstacles. The proposed algorithm is built upon the RRT algorithm with a multi-tree structure. At the beginning, the RRT algorithm is applied to find the initial solution based on partial knowledge of the environment. Then, the robot starts to execute this path. At each iteration, the new obstacle configurations are collected by the robot's sensor and used to replan the path. This new information can come from unknown static obstacles (e.g., seafloor layout) as well as moving obstacles. Then, to accommodate the environmental changes, two procedures are adopted: 1) edge pruning, and 2) tree regrowing. Specifically, the edge pruning procedure checks the collision status through the tree and only removes the invalid edges while maintaining the tree structure of already-explored regions. Due to removal of invalid edges, the tree could be broken into multiple disjoint trees. As such, the RRT algorithm is applied to regrow the trees. Specifically, a sample is created randomly and joined to all the disjoint trees in its local neighborhood by connecting to the nearest nodes. Finally, a new solution is found for the robot. The advantages of the proposed MRRT algorithm are as follows: i) retains the maximal tree structure by only pruning the edges which collide with the obstacles, ii) guarantees probabilistic completeness, and iii) is computational efficient for fast replanning since all disjoint trees are maintained for future connections and expanded simultaneously. 本文提出了一种名为 MRRT 的新颖算法，该算法使用多个快速探索的随机树在有移动障碍物的动态环境中快速在线重新规划自动驾驶车辆。所提出的算法建立在具有多树结构的RRT算法的基础上。首先，应用RRT算法基于部分环境知识来寻找初始解。然后，机器人开始执行该路径。在每次迭代中，机器人的传感器都会收集新的障碍物配置并用于重新规划路径。这些新信息可以来自未知的静态障碍物（例如海底布局）以及移动障碍物。然后，为了适应环境变化，采用了两个过程：1）边缘修剪，2）树木重新生长。具体来说，边缘修剪过程通过树检查碰撞状态，并且仅删除无效边缘，同时保持已探索区域的树结构。由于删除了无效边，树可能会被分成多个不相交的树。因此，应用 RRT 算法来重新生长树木。具体来说，样本是随机创建的，并通过连接到最近的节点来连接到其本地邻域中的所有不相交树。最终，为机器人找到了新的解决方案。所提出的 MRRT 算法的优点如下：i）仅通过修剪与障碍物碰撞的边缘来保留最大树结构，ii）保证概率完整性，以及 iii）计算效率高，可快速重新规划，因为所有不相交的树都为未来的连接而维护并同时扩展。 本文提出了一种名为MRRT的新算法，利用多棵快速探索随机树（RRT）实现动态环境中自主车辆的快速在线路径重规划。 Zongyuan Shen,James P. Wilson,Ryan Harvey,Shalabh Gupta cs.RO,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Lie Ju,Xin Wang,Lin Wang,Tongliang Liu,Xin Zhao,Tom Drummond,Dwarikanath Mahapatra,Zongyuan Ge
title: Relational Subsets Knowledge Distillation for Long-tailed Retinal Diseases Recognition
title_zh: 长尾视网膜疾病识别的关系子集知识蒸馏
abstract: In the real world, medical datasets often exhibit a long-tailed data distribution (i.e., a few classes occupy most of the data, while most classes have rarely few samples), which results in a challenging imbalance learning scenario. For example, there are estimated more than 40 different kinds of retinal diseases with variable morbidity, however with more than 30+ conditions are very rare from the global patient cohorts, which results in a typical long-tailed learning problem for deep learning-based screening models. In this study, we propose class subset learning by dividing the long-tailed data into multiple class subsets according to prior knowledge, such as regions and phenotype information. It enforces the model to focus on learning the subset-specific knowledge. More specifically, there are some relational classes that reside in the fixed retinal regions, or some common pathological features are observed in both the majority and minority conditions. With those subsets learnt teacher models, then we are able to distill the multiple teacher models into a unified model with weighted knowledge distillation loss. The proposed framework proved to be effective for the long-tailed retinal diseases recognition task. The experimental results on two different datasets demonstrate that our method is flexible and can be easily plugged into many other state-of-the-art techniques with significant improvements.
summary: In the real world, medical datasets often exhibit a long-tailed data distribution (i.e., a few classes occupy most of the data, while most classes have rarely few samples), which results in a challenging imbalance learning scenario. For example, there are estimated more than 40 different kinds of retinal diseases with variable morbidity, however with more than 30+ conditions are very rare from the global patient cohorts, which results in a typical long-tailed learning problem for deep learning-based screening models. In this study, we propose class subset learning by dividing the long-tailed data into multiple class subsets according to prior knowledge, such as regions and phenotype information. It enforces the model to focus on learning the subset-specific knowledge. More specifically, there are some relational classes that reside in the fixed retinal regions, or some common pathological features are observed in both the majority and minority conditions. With those subsets learnt teacher models, then we are able to distill the multiple teacher models into a unified model with weighted knowledge distillation loss. The proposed framework proved to be effective for the long-tailed retinal diseases recognition task. The experimental results on two different datasets demonstrate that our method is flexible and can be easily plugged into many other state-of-the-art techniques with significant improvements.
abstract_zh: 在现实世界中，医学数据集通常表现出长尾数据分布（即少数类别占据大部分数据，而大多数类别很少有样本），这导致了具有挑战性的不平衡学习场景。例如，估计有超过 40 种不同的视网膜疾病，其发病率各不相同，但超过 30 种的疾病在全球患者队列中非常罕见，这导致基于深度学习的筛查模型出现典型的长尾学习问题。在本研究中，我们提出了类子集学习，根据先验知识（例如区域和表型信息）将长尾数据划分为多个类子集。它强制模型专注于学习子集特定的知识。更具体地说，有一些关系类别驻留在固定的视网膜区域中，或者在大多数和少数情况下都观察到一些共同的病理特征。通过这些子集学习的教师模型，我们就可以将多个教师模型提炼成具有加权知识蒸馏损失的统一模型。事实证明，所提出的框架对于长尾视网膜疾病识别任务是有效的。两个不同数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法非常灵活，可以轻松插入许多其他最先进的技术中，并取得重大改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于关系子集知识蒸馏的方法，用于解决长尾分布下的视网膜疾病识别问题。
AI.motivation: 医学数据集常呈现长尾分布，少数类别样本稀缺导致模型性能下降，传统方法难以有效处理此类不平衡学习问题。
AI.method: 根据先验知识（如解剖区域和表型特征）将长尾数据划分为多个类子集，训练多个教师模型并采用加权知识蒸馏损失将其整合为统一模型。
AI.result: 在两个不同数据集上实验表明，该方法显著提升长尾视网膜疾病识别效果，且可灵活集成到其他先进方法中。
AI.conclusion: 通过子集划分与知识蒸馏结合，有效缓解长尾分布问题，为医学图像分类提供新思路。

authors_text: Weizhe Liu,David Ferstl,Samuel Schulter,Lukas Zebedin,Pascal Fua,Christian Leistner
title: Domain Adaptation for Semantic Segmentation via Patch-Wise Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过逐块对比学习进行语义分割的领域适应
abstract: We introduce a novel approach to unsupervised and semi-supervised domain adaptation for semantic segmentation. Unlike many earlier methods that rely on adversarial learning for feature alignment, we leverage contrastive learning to bridge the domain gap by aligning the features of structurally similar label patches across domains. As a result, the networks are easier to train and deliver better performance. Our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised and semi-supervised methods on two challenging domain adaptive segmentation tasks, particularly with a small number of target domain annotations. It can also be naturally extended to weakly-supervised domain adaptation, where only a minor drop in accuracy can save up to 75% of annotation cost.
summary: We introduce a novel approach to unsupervised and semi-supervised domain adaptation for semantic segmentation. Unlike many earlier methods that rely on adversarial learning for feature alignment, we leverage contrastive learning to bridge the domain gap by aligning the features of structurally similar label patches across domains. As a result, the networks are easier to train and deliver better performance. Our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised and semi-supervised methods on two challenging domain adaptive segmentation tasks, particularly with a small number of target domain annotations. It can also be naturally extended to weakly-supervised domain adaptation, where only a minor drop in accuracy can save up to 75% of annotation cost.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种用于语义分割的无监督和半监督域适应的新方法。与许多依赖对抗性学习进行特征对齐的早期方法不同，我们利用对比学习通过跨域对齐结构相似的标签补丁的特征来弥合域差距。因此，网络更容易训练并提供更好的性能。我们的方法在两个具有挑战性的域自适应分割任务上始终优于最先进的无监督和半监督方法，特别是在少量目标域注释的情况下。它还可以自然地扩展到弱监督领域适应，其中仅精确度的微小下降就可以节省高达 75% 的注释成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于块级对比学习的领域适应方法，用于改进语义分割任务中的跨领域特征对齐。
AI.motivation: 传统对抗学习方法在领域适应中存在训练不稳定和特征对齐困难的问题，而对比学习能更有效捕捉结构相似性，提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过对比学习对齐源域和目标域中结构相似的标签块特征，无需对抗训练，简化模型优化过程。
AI.result: 在两个领域适应分割任务中优于现有方法，尤其在目标域标注数据极少时表现显著，且可节省75%的标注成本。
AI.conclusion: 块级对比学习有效解决了领域间隙问题，方法简单易训练，具有良好的扩展性和实际应用价值。

conclusion: 块级对比学习有效解决了领域间隙问题，方法简单易训练，具有良好的扩展性和实际应用价值。
search_text: Domain Adaptation for Semantic Segmentation via Patch-Wise Contrastive Learning 通过逐块对比学习进行语义分割的领域适应 We introduce a novel approach to unsupervised and semi-supervised domain adaptation for semantic segmentation. Unlike many earlier methods that rely on adversarial learning for feature alignment, we leverage contrastive learning to bridge the domain gap by aligning the features of structurally similar label patches across domains. As a result, the networks are easier to train and deliver better performance. Our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised and semi-supervised methods on two challenging domain adaptive segmentation tasks, particularly with a small number of target domain annotations. It can also be naturally extended to weakly-supervised domain adaptation, where only a minor drop in accuracy can save up to 75% of annotation cost. 我们引入了一种用于语义分割的无监督和半监督域适应的新方法。与许多依赖对抗性学习进行特征对齐的早期方法不同，我们利用对比学习通过跨域对齐结构相似的标签补丁的特征来弥合域差距。因此，网络更容易训练并提供更好的性能。我们的方法在两个具有挑战性的域自适应分割任务上始终优于最先进的无监督和半监督方法，特别是在少量目标域注释的情况下。它还可以自然地扩展到弱监督领域适应，其中仅精确度的微小下降就可以节省高达 75% 的注释成本。 本文提出一种基于块级对比学习的领域适应方法，用于改进语义分割任务中的跨领域特征对齐。 Weizhe Liu,David Ferstl,Samuel Schulter,Lukas Zebedin,Pascal Fua,Christian Leistner cs.CV

authors_text: Xisuo Ma,Zhen Gao,Feifei Gao,Marco Di Renzo
title: Model-Driven Deep Learning Based Channel Estimation and Feedback for Millimeter-Wave Massive Hybrid MIMO Systems
title_zh: 基于模型驱动的深度学习的毫米波大规模混合 MIMO 系统的信道估计和反馈
comment: 18 pages, 18 figures, 2 tables. Accepted in IEEE JSAC. The codes may be available at https://gaozhen16.github.io
comments: 18 pages, 18 figures, 2 tables. Accepted in IEEE JSAC. The codes may be available at https://gaozhen16.github.io
abstract: This paper proposes a model-driven deep learning (MDDL)-based channel estimation and feedback scheme for wideband millimeter-wave (mmWave) massive hybrid multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) systems, where the angle-delay domain channels' sparsity is exploited for reducing the overhead. Firstly, we consider the uplink channel estimation for time-division duplexing systems. To reduce the uplink pilot overhead for estimating the high-dimensional channels from a limited number of radio frequency (RF) chains at the base station (BS), we propose to jointly train the phase shift network and the channel estimator as an auto-encoder. Particularly, by exploiting the channels' structured sparsity from an a priori model and learning the integrated trainable parameters from the data samples, the proposed multiple-measurement-vectors learned approximate message passing (MMV-LAMP) network with the devised redundant dictionary can jointly recover multiple subcarriers' channels with significantly enhanced performance. Moreover, we consider the downlink channel estimation and feedback for frequency-division duplexing systems. Similarly, the pilots at the BS and channel estimator at the users can be jointly trained as an encoder and a decoder, respectively. Besides, to further reduce the channel feedback overhead, only the received pilots on part of the subcarriers are fed back to the BS, which can exploit the MMV-LAMP network to reconstruct the spatial-frequency channel matrix. Numerical results show that the proposed MDDL-based channel estimation and feedback scheme outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: This paper proposes a model-driven deep learning (MDDL)-based channel estimation and feedback scheme for wideband millimeter-wave (mmWave) massive hybrid multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) systems, where the angle-delay domain channels' sparsity is exploited for reducing the overhead. Firstly, we consider the uplink channel estimation for time-division duplexing systems. To reduce the uplink pilot overhead for estimating the high-dimensional channels from a limited number of radio frequency (RF) chains at the base station (BS), we propose to jointly train the phase shift network and the channel estimator as an auto-encoder. Particularly, by exploiting the channels' structured sparsity from an a priori model and learning the integrated trainable parameters from the data samples, the proposed multiple-measurement-vectors learned approximate message passing (MMV-LAMP) network with the devised redundant dictionary can jointly recover multiple subcarriers' channels with significantly enhanced performance. Moreover, we consider the downlink channel estimation and feedback for frequency-division duplexing systems. Similarly, the pilots at the BS and channel estimator at the users can be jointly trained as an encoder and a decoder, respectively. Besides, to further reduce the channel feedback overhead, only the received pilots on part of the subcarriers are fed back to the BS, which can exploit the MMV-LAMP network to reconstruct the spatial-frequency channel matrix. Numerical results show that the proposed MDDL-based channel estimation and feedback scheme outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于模型驱动的深度学习（MDDL）的宽带毫米波（mmWave）大规模混合多输入多输出（MIMO）系统的信道估计和反馈方案，其中利用角延迟域信道的稀疏性来减少开销。首先，我们考虑时分双工系统的上行链路信道估计。为了减少从基站（BS）的有限数量的射频（RF）链估计高维信道的上行链路导频开销，我们建议联合训练相移网络和信道估计器作为自动编码器。特别是，通过利用先验模型中的通道结构稀疏性并从数据样本中学习集成的可训练参数，所提出的多测量向量学习近似消息传递（MMV-LAMP）网络与设计的冗余字典可以联合恢复多个子载波的通道，并显着增强性能。此外，我们还考虑了频分双工系统的下行链路信道估计和反馈。类似地，BS处的导频和用户处的信道估计器可以分别联合训练为编码器和解码器。此外，为了进一步减少信道反馈开销，仅将部分子载波上的接收导频反馈给BS，BS可以利用MMV-LAMP网络来重建空间频率信道矩阵。数值结果表明，所提出的基于 MDDL 的信道估计和反馈方案优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型驱动的深度学习（MDDL）的毫米波大规模混合MIMO系统信道估计与反馈方案，利用角度-延迟域信道的稀疏性降低开销。
AI.motivation: 传统信道估计方法在毫米波宽频系统中面临高开销问题，尤其在上行链路和下行链路中需减少导频开销并提升估计性能。
AI.method: 通过联合训练相移网络和信道估计器的自编码器结构，结合先验模型的结构化稀疏性与数据驱动参数学习，提出MMV-LAMP网络及冗余字典，实现多子载波信道联合恢复；下行链路中采用编码器-解码器架构并反馈部分子载波导频以降低反馈开销。
AI.result: 数值结果表明，所提MDDL方案在信道估计和反馈性能上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于模型驱动的深度学习方法能有效利用信道稀疏性，显著降低毫米波混合MIMO系统的信道估计与反馈开销，提升系统性能。

authors_text: Dimitrios Stoidis,Andrea Cavallaro
title: Protecting gender and identity with disentangled speech representations
title_zh: 通过解开的语音表征来保护性别和身份
abstract: Besides its linguistic content, our speech is rich in biometric information that can be inferred by classifiers. Learning privacy-preserving representations for speech signals enables downstream tasks without sharing unnecessary, private information about an individual. In this paper, we show that protecting gender information in speech is more effective than modelling speaker-identity information only when generating a non-sensitive representation of speech. Our method relies on reconstructing speech by decoding linguistic content along with gender information using a variational autoencoder. Specifically, we exploit disentangled representation learning to encode information about different attributes into separate subspaces that can be factorised independently. We present a novel way to encode gender information and disentangle two sensitive biometric identifiers, namely gender and identity, in a privacy-protecting setting. Experiments on the LibriSpeech dataset show that gender recognition and speaker verification can be reduced to a random guess, protecting against classification-based attacks.
summary: Besides its linguistic content, our speech is rich in biometric information that can be inferred by classifiers. Learning privacy-preserving representations for speech signals enables downstream tasks without sharing unnecessary, private information about an individual. In this paper, we show that protecting gender information in speech is more effective than modelling speaker-identity information only when generating a non-sensitive representation of speech. Our method relies on reconstructing speech by decoding linguistic content along with gender information using a variational autoencoder. Specifically, we exploit disentangled representation learning to encode information about different attributes into separate subspaces that can be factorised independently. We present a novel way to encode gender information and disentangle two sensitive biometric identifiers, namely gender and identity, in a privacy-protecting setting. Experiments on the LibriSpeech dataset show that gender recognition and speaker verification can be reduced to a random guess, protecting against classification-based attacks.
abstract_zh: 除了语言内容之外，我们的语音还富含可以通过分类器推断的生物识别信息。学习语音信号的隐私保护表示可以实现下游任务，而无需共享有关个人的不必要的私人信息。在本文中，我们表明，仅在生成不敏感的语音表示时，保护语音中的性别信息比对说话者身份信息进行建模更有效。我们的方法依赖于通过使用变分自动编码器解码语言内容和性别信息来重建语音。具体来说，我们利用解缠结表示学习将有关不同属性的信息编码到可以独立分解的单独子空间中。我们提出了一种新颖的方法来编码性别信息，并在隐私保护环境中解开两个敏感的生物识别标识符，即性别和身份。 LibriSpeech 数据集上的实验表明，性别识别和说话人验证可以简化为随机猜测，从而防止基于分类的攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过解耦语音表示来保护性别和身份信息的方法，防止语音数据中的敏感生物特征被推断。
AI.motivation: 语音信号包含性别和身份等敏感生物特征，可能被用于隐私侵犯。现有方法仅保护身份信息效果有限，需更全面的隐私保护方案。
AI.method: 基于变分自编码器（VAE）构建解耦表示学习框架，将语言内容与性别信息分离至独立子空间，实现敏感属性的隐私保护。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech数据集上，性别识别和说话人验证任务的准确率降至随机水平，有效抵御分类攻击。
AI.conclusion: 解耦表示学习能有效分离敏感属性，相比单一身份保护方法更具隐私保护优势，为语音隐私研究提供新方向。

authors_text: James Lucas,Juhan Bae,Michael R. Zhang,Stanislav Fort,Richard Zemel,Roger Grosse
title: Analyzing Monotonic Linear Interpolation in Neural Network Loss Landscapes
title_zh: 分析神经网络损失情况中的单调线性插值
comment: 15 pages in main paper, 4 pages of references, 24 pages in appendix. 29 figures in total
comments: 15 pages in main paper, 4 pages of references, 24 pages in appendix. 29 figures in total
abstract: Linear interpolation between initial neural network parameters and converged parameters after training with stochastic gradient descent (SGD) typically leads to a monotonic decrease in the training objective. This Monotonic Linear Interpolation (MLI) property, first observed by Goodfellow et al. (2014) persists in spite of the non-convex objectives and highly non-linear training dynamics of neural networks. Extending this work, we evaluate several hypotheses for this property that, to our knowledge, have not yet been explored. Using tools from differential geometry, we draw connections between the interpolated paths in function space and the monotonicity of the network - providing sufficient conditions for the MLI property under mean squared error. While the MLI property holds under various settings (e.g. network architectures and learning problems), we show in practice that networks violating the MLI property can be produced systematically, by encouraging the weights to move far from initialization. The MLI property raises important questions about the loss landscape geometry of neural networks and highlights the need to further study their global properties.
summary: Linear interpolation between initial neural network parameters and converged parameters after training with stochastic gradient descent (SGD) typically leads to a monotonic decrease in the training objective. This Monotonic Linear Interpolation (MLI) property, first observed by Goodfellow et al. (2014) persists in spite of the non-convex objectives and highly non-linear training dynamics of neural networks. Extending this work, we evaluate several hypotheses for this property that, to our knowledge, have not yet been explored. Using tools from differential geometry, we draw connections between the interpolated paths in function space and the monotonicity of the network - providing sufficient conditions for the MLI property under mean squared error. While the MLI property holds under various settings (e.g. network architectures and learning problems), we show in practice that networks violating the MLI property can be produced systematically, by encouraging the weights to move far from initialization. The MLI property raises important questions about the loss landscape geometry of neural networks and highlights the need to further study their global properties.
abstract_zh: 使用随机梯度下降 (SGD) 训练后，初始神经网络参数和收敛参数之间的线性插值通常会导致训练目标单调下降。 Goodfellow 等人首先观察到了这种单调线性插值 (MLI) 属性。尽管神经网络具有非凸目标和高度非线性的训练动态，但（2014）仍然存在。扩展这项工作，我们评估了该属性的几个假设，据我们所知，这些假设尚未被探索。使用微分几何工具，我们在函数空间中的插值路径和网络的单调性之间建立联系，为均方误差下的 MLI 属性提供充分的条件。虽然 MLI 属性在各种设置（例如网络架构和学习问题）下都成立，但我们在实践中表明，通过鼓励权重远离初始化，可以系统地生成违反 MLI 属性的网络。 MLI 属性提出了有关神经网络损失景观几何的重要问题，并强调了进一步研究其全局属性的必要性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究神经网络损失景观中单调线性插值（MLI）现象的成因及其影响，通过几何工具分析参数插值路径与损失单调性的关系。
AI.motivation: 尽管神经网络目标函数高度非凸且训练动态复杂，但参数线性插值路径仍表现出损失单调下降的特性（MLI），这一现象的内在机制尚不明确，需进一步探索其几何解释与适用边界。
AI.method: 结合微分几何工具，分析函数空间中插值路径与损失单调性的关联，通过理论推导给出均方误差下MLI成立的充分条件，并设计实验验证不同网络结构与训练场景下的MLI表现。
AI.result: MLI在多数网络架构与任务中成立，但通过刻意引导参数远离初始化可系统性破坏该特性，表明其成立依赖于参数更新幅度的限制。
AI.conclusion: MLI现象揭示了神经网络损失景观的特殊几何性质，但其非普遍性提示需更深入研究损失景观的全局特性及优化动态的本质规律。

authors_text: Markus Thaler,Stephan Schlögl,Aleksander Groth
title: Agent vs. Avatar: Comparing Embodied Conversational Agents Concerning Characteristics of the Uncanny Valley
title_zh: 代理与阿凡达：比较有关恐怖谷特征的具体会话代理
abstract: Visual appearance is an important aspect influencing the perception and consequent acceptance of Embodied Conversational Agents (ECA). To this end, the Uncanny Valley theory contradicts the common assumption that increased humanization of characters leads to better acceptance. Rather, it shows that anthropomorphic behavior may trigger feelings of eeriness and rejection in people. The work presented in this paper explores whether four different autonomous ECAs, specifically build for a European research project, are affected by this effect, and how they compare to two slightly more realistically looking human-controlled, i.e. face-tracked, ECAs with respect to perceived humanness, eeriness, and attractiveness. Short videos of the ECAs in combination with a validated questionnaire were used to investigate potential differences. Results support existing theories highlighting that increased perceived humanness correlates with increased perceived eeriness. Furthermore, it was found, that neither the gender of survey participants, their age, nor the sex of the ECA influences this effect, and that female ECAs are perceived to be significantly more attractive than their male counterparts.
summary: Visual appearance is an important aspect influencing the perception and consequent acceptance of Embodied Conversational Agents (ECA). To this end, the Uncanny Valley theory contradicts the common assumption that increased humanization of characters leads to better acceptance. Rather, it shows that anthropomorphic behavior may trigger feelings of eeriness and rejection in people. The work presented in this paper explores whether four different autonomous ECAs, specifically build for a European research project, are affected by this effect, and how they compare to two slightly more realistically looking human-controlled, i.e. face-tracked, ECAs with respect to perceived humanness, eeriness, and attractiveness. Short videos of the ECAs in combination with a validated questionnaire were used to investigate potential differences. Results support existing theories highlighting that increased perceived humanness correlates with increased perceived eeriness. Furthermore, it was found, that neither the gender of survey participants, their age, nor the sex of the ECA influences this effect, and that female ECAs are perceived to be significantly more attractive than their male counterparts.
abstract_zh: 视觉外观是影响实体对话代理（ECA）的感知和随后接受度的一个重要方面。为此，恐怖谷理论与普遍的假设相矛盾，即增加角色的人性化会带来更好的接受度。相反，它表明拟人化行为可能会引发人们的怪异和拒绝感。本文介绍的工作探讨了专门为欧洲研究项目构建的四种不同的自主 ECA 是否受到这种效应的影响，以及它们与两个看起来更真实的人类控制（即面部跟踪）ECA 在感知人性、怪异性和吸引力方面的比较。 ECA 的短视频与经过验证的调查问卷相结合，用于调查潜在差异。结果支持了现有的理论，强调人性感知的增加与怪异感知的增加相关。此外，研究发现，调查参与者的性别、年龄以及 ECA 的性别都不会影响这种效应，并且女性 ECA 被认为比男性同行更具吸引力。

AI.tldr: 比较自主具身对话代理（ECA）与人类控制ECA在恐怖谷效应下的感知差异，探讨其人性化程度、诡异感和吸引力的关联。
AI.motivation: 验证恐怖谷理论在ECA中的适用性，分析不同ECA设计对用户感知的影响，以及性别、年龄等因素是否影响该效应。
AI.method: 通过短视频展示四种自主ECA与两种人类控制ECA，结合问卷调查分析参与者对人性化、诡异感和吸引力的感知差异。
AI.result: 感知人性化与诡异感呈正相关；参与者性别、年龄及ECA性别不影响该效应，女性ECA被普遍认为更具吸引力。
AI.conclusion: 研究支持恐怖谷理论在ECA中的有效性，表明过度拟人化可能引发排斥感，且女性ECA在吸引力上具有优势。

authors_text: Mohammad Niknazar,Aditya Vempaty,Ravi Kokku
title: Voice Privacy with Smart Digital Assistants in Educational Settings
title_zh: 教育环境中智能数字助理的语音隐私
abstract: The emergence of voice-assistant devices ushers in delightful user experiences not just on the smart home front, but also in diverse educational environments from classrooms to personalized-learning/tutoring. However, the use of voice as an interaction modality also could result in exposure of user's identity, and hinders the broader adoption of voice interfaces; this is especially important in environments where children are present and their voice privacy needs to be protected. To this end, building on state-of-the-art techniques proposed in the literature, we design and evaluate a practical and efficient framework for voice privacy at the source. The approach combines speaker identification (SID) and speech conversion methods to randomly disguise the identity of users right on the device that records the speech, while ensuring that the transformed utterances of users can still be successfully transcribed by Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) solutions. We evaluate the ASR performance of the conversion in terms of word error rate and show the promise of this framework in preserving the content of the input speech.
summary: The emergence of voice-assistant devices ushers in delightful user experiences not just on the smart home front, but also in diverse educational environments from classrooms to personalized-learning/tutoring. However, the use of voice as an interaction modality also could result in exposure of user's identity, and hinders the broader adoption of voice interfaces; this is especially important in environments where children are present and their voice privacy needs to be protected. To this end, building on state-of-the-art techniques proposed in the literature, we design and evaluate a practical and efficient framework for voice privacy at the source. The approach combines speaker identification (SID) and speech conversion methods to randomly disguise the identity of users right on the device that records the speech, while ensuring that the transformed utterances of users can still be successfully transcribed by Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) solutions. We evaluate the ASR performance of the conversion in terms of word error rate and show the promise of this framework in preserving the content of the input speech.
abstract_zh: 语音辅助设备的出现不仅在智能家居领域，而且在从教室到个性化学习/辅导的各种教育环境中带来了令人愉快的用户体验。然而，使用语音作为交互方式也可能导致用户身份暴露，并阻碍语音界面的更广泛采用；这在有儿童存在并且需要保护他们的语音隐私的环境中尤其重要。为此，我们以文献中提出的最先进技术为基础，从源头上设计和评估了一个实用且高效的语音隐私框架。该方法结合了说话人识别（SID）和语音转换方法，可以在记录语音的设备上随机伪装用户的身份，同时确保自动语音识别（ASR）解决方案仍然可以成功转录用户转换后的话语。我们根据单词错误率评估转换的 ASR 性能，并展示该框架在保留输入语音内容方面的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在教育场景中使用智能语音助手时保护用户语音隐私的框架，通过在设备端实时转换语音以隐藏身份，同时确保语音识别准确性。
AI.motivation: 语音交互在教育环境中普及面临用户身份暴露风险，尤其需保护儿童隐私，现有技术难以兼顾隐私保护与语音识别效果。
AI.method: 结合说话人识别（SID）与语音转换技术，在设备端随机伪装用户语音身份，确保转换后语音仍可被自动语音识别（ASR）系统准确转录。
AI.result: 实验表明转换后的语音在词错误率（WER）指标下保持较高识别准确率，验证了框架在保护语音内容隐私方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为教育场景中的语音隐私保护提供了可行方案，在用户身份伪装与语音识别性能间实现了平衡。

search_text: Voice Privacy with Smart Digital Assistants in Educational Settings 教育环境中智能数字助理的语音隐私 The emergence of voice-assistant devices ushers in delightful user experiences not just on the smart home front, but also in diverse educational environments from classrooms to personalized-learning/tutoring. However, the use of voice as an interaction modality also could result in exposure of user's identity, and hinders the broader adoption of voice interfaces; this is especially important in environments where children are present and their voice privacy needs to be protected. To this end, building on state-of-the-art techniques proposed in the literature, we design and evaluate a practical and efficient framework for voice privacy at the source. The approach combines speaker identification (SID) and speech conversion methods to randomly disguise the identity of users right on the device that records the speech, while ensuring that the transformed utterances of users can still be successfully transcribed by Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) solutions. We evaluate the ASR performance of the conversion in terms of word error rate and show the promise of this framework in preserving the content of the input speech. 语音辅助设备的出现不仅在智能家居领域，而且在从教室到个性化学习/辅导的各种教育环境中带来了令人愉快的用户体验。然而，使用语音作为交互方式也可能导致用户身份暴露，并阻碍语音界面的更广泛采用；这在有儿童存在并且需要保护他们的语音隐私的环境中尤其重要。为此，我们以文献中提出的最先进技术为基础，从源头上设计和评估了一个实用且高效的语音隐私框架。该方法结合了说话人识别（SID）和语音转换方法，可以在记录语音的设备上随机伪装用户的身份，同时确保自动语音识别（ASR）解决方案仍然可以成功转录用户转换后的话语。我们根据单词错误率评估转换的 ASR 性能，并展示该框架在保留输入语音内容方面的前景。 本文提出了一种在教育场景中使用智能语音助手时保护用户语音隐私的框架，通过在设备端实时转换语音以隐藏身份，同时确保语音识别准确性。 Mohammad Niknazar,Aditya Vempaty,Ravi Kokku eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.CR,cs.SD

authors_text: Antonios Liapis
title: 10 Years of the PCG workshop: Past and Future Trends
title_zh: PCG 研讨会 10 年：过去和未来趋势
abstract: As of 2020, the international workshop on Procedural Content Generation enters its second decade. The annual workshop, hosted by the international conference on the Foundations of Digital Games, has collected a corpus of 95 papers published in its first 10 years. This paper provides an overview of the workshop's activities and surveys the prevalent research topics emerging over the years.
summary: As of 2020, the international workshop on Procedural Content Generation enters its second decade. The annual workshop, hosted by the international conference on the Foundations of Digital Games, has collected a corpus of 95 papers published in its first 10 years. This paper provides an overview of the workshop's activities and surveys the prevalent research topics emerging over the years.
abstract_zh: 截至 2020 年，程序内容生成国际研讨会进入了第二个十年。该年度研讨会由数字游戏基础国际会议主办，收集了前 10 年发表的 95 篇论文。本文概述了研讨会的活动并调查了多年来出现的流行研究主题。

AI.tldr: 回顾PCG工作坊十年来的活动，分析研究趋势并展望未来
AI.motivation: 评估过去十年PCG领域研究进展，识别关键趋势并为未来研究提供方向
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析95篇论文，归纳研究主题和方法论演变
AI.result: 总结出算法创新、应用领域扩展及跨学科融合等核心研究趋势
AI.conclusion: PCG研究持续推动游戏开发技术革新，需加强跨学科合作与新型生成算法探索

authors_text: Kristina Tesch,Timo Gerkmann
title: Nonlinear Spatial Filtering in Multichannel Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 多通道语音增强中的非线性空间滤波
abstract: The majority of multichannel speech enhancement algorithms are two-step procedures that first apply a linear spatial filter, a so-called beamformer, and combine it with a single-channel approach for postprocessing. However, the serial concatenation of a linear spatial filter and a postfilter is not generally optimal in the minimum mean square error (MMSE) sense for noise distributions other than a Gaussian distribution. Rather, the MMSE optimal filter is a joint spatial and spectral nonlinear function. While estimating the parameters of such a filter with traditional methods is challenging, modern neural networks may provide an efficient way to learn the nonlinear function directly from data. To see if further research in this direction is worthwhile, in this work we examine the potential performance benefit of replacing the common two-step procedure with a joint spatial and spectral nonlinear filter. We analyze three different forms of non-Gaussianity: First, we evaluate on super-Gaussian noise with a high kurtosis. Second, we evaluate on inhomogeneous noise fields created by five interfering sources using two microphones, and third, we evaluate on real-world recordings from the CHiME3 database. In all scenarios, considerable improvements may be obtained. Most prominently, our analyses show that a nonlinear spatial filter uses the available spatial information more effectively than a linear spatial filter as it is capable of suppressing more than $D-1$ directional interfering sources with a $D$-dimensional microphone array without spatial adaptation.
summary: The majority of multichannel speech enhancement algorithms are two-step procedures that first apply a linear spatial filter, a so-called beamformer, and combine it with a single-channel approach for postprocessing. However, the serial concatenation of a linear spatial filter and a postfilter is not generally optimal in the minimum mean square error (MMSE) sense for noise distributions other than a Gaussian distribution. Rather, the MMSE optimal filter is a joint spatial and spectral nonlinear function. While estimating the parameters of such a filter with traditional methods is challenging, modern neural networks may provide an efficient way to learn the nonlinear function directly from data. To see if further research in this direction is worthwhile, in this work we examine the potential performance benefit of replacing the common two-step procedure with a joint spatial and spectral nonlinear filter. We analyze three different forms of non-Gaussianity: First, we evaluate on super-Gaussian noise with a high kurtosis. Second, we evaluate on inhomogeneous noise fields created by five interfering sources using two microphones, and third, we evaluate on real-world recordings from the CHiME3 database. In all scenarios, considerable improvements may be obtained. Most prominently, our analyses show that a nonlinear spatial filter uses the available spatial information more effectively than a linear spatial filter as it is capable of suppressing more than $D-1$ directional interfering sources with a $D$-dimensional microphone array without spatial adaptation.
abstract_zh: 大多数多通道语音增强算法都是两步过程，首先应用线性空间滤波器（即所谓的波束形成器），并将其与单通道方法相结合进行后处理。然而，对于除高斯分布之外的噪声分布，线性空间滤波器和后滤波器的串联串联在最小均方误差（MMSE）意义上通常不是最佳的。相反，MMSE 最优滤波器是联合空间和谱非线性函数。虽然用传统方法估计此类滤波器的参数具有挑战性，但现代神经网络可以提供一种直接从数据学习非线性函数的有效方法。为了看看这个方向的进一步研究是否值得，在这项工作中，我们研究了用联合空间和光谱非线性滤波器代替常见的两步过程的潜在性能优势。我们分析了三种不同形式的非高斯性：首先，我们评估具有高峰度的超高斯噪声。其次，我们使用两个麦克风评估由五个干扰源产生的不均匀噪声场，第三，我们评估来自 CHiME3 数据库的真实世界录音。在所有情况下，都可以获得相当大的改进。最重要的是，我们的分析表明，非线性空间滤波器比线性空间滤波器更有效地利用可用的空间信息，因为它能够使用 $D$ 维麦克风阵列抑制超过 $D-1$ 的定向干扰源，而无需空间自适应。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了使用非线性空间滤波器替代传统两步法在多通道语音增强中的性能优势。
AI.motivation: 传统多通道语音增强算法采用线性空间滤波器与后处理步骤的串行连接，但在非高斯噪声分布下并非最优，因此需要研究非线性空间滤波器的潜力。
AI.method: 本文通过分析三种非高斯噪声场景，评估了非线性空间滤波器的性能，包括超高斯噪声、多源干扰噪声和真实世界录音。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，非线性空间滤波器在所有场景中均能显著提高语音增强效果，并能更有效地利用空间信息以抑制干扰源。
AI.conclusion: 非线性空间滤波器在多通道语音增强中具有显著优势，特别是在非高斯噪声环境下，值得进一步研究。

Second, we evaluate on inhomogeneous noise fields created by five interfering sources using two microphones, and third, we evaluate on real-world recordings from the CHiME3 database. In all scenarios, considerable improvements may be obtained. Most prominently, our analyses show that a nonlinear spatial filter uses the available spatial information more effectively than a linear spatial filter as it is capable of suppressing more than $D-1$ directional interfering sources with a $D$-dimensional microphone array without spatial adaptation. 大多数多通道语音增强算法都是两步过程，首先应用线性空间滤波器（即所谓的波束形成器），并将其与单通道方法相结合进行后处理。然而，对于除高斯分布之外的噪声分布，线性空间滤波器和后滤波器的串联串联在最小均方误差（MMSE）意义上通常不是最佳的。相反，MMSE 最优滤波器是联合空间和谱非线性函数。虽然用传统方法估计此类滤波器的参数具有挑战性，但现代神经网络可以提供一种直接从数据学习非线性函数的有效方法。为了看看这个方向的进一步研究是否值得，在这项工作中，我们研究了用联合空间和光谱非线性滤波器代替常见的两步过程的潜在性能优势。我们分析了三种不同形式的非高斯性：首先，我们评估具有高峰度的超高斯噪声。其次，我们使用两个麦克风评估由五个干扰源产生的不均匀噪声场，第三，我们评估来自 CHiME3 数据库的真实世界录音。在所有情况下，都可以获得相当大的改进。最重要的是，我们的分析表明，非线性空间滤波器比线性空间滤波器更有效地利用可用的空间信息，因为它能够使用 $D$ 维麦克风阵列抑制超过 $D-1$ 的定向干扰源，而无需空间自适应。 本文探讨了使用非线性空间滤波器替代传统两步法在多通道语音增强中的性能优势。 Kristina Tesch,Timo Gerkmann eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Moeen Mostafavi,Michael D. Porter
title: How emoji and word embedding helps to unveil emotional transitions during online messaging
title_zh: 表情符号和文字嵌入如何帮助揭示在线消息传递过程中的情绪转变
abstract: During online chats, body-language and vocal characteristics are not part of the communication mechanism making it challenging to facilitate an accurate interpretation of feelings, emotions, and attitudes. The use of emojis to express emotional feeling is an alternative approach in these types of communication. In this project, we focus on modeling a customer's emotion in an online messaging session with a chatbot. We use Affect Control Theory (ACT) to predict emotional change during the interaction. To let the customer use emojis, we also extend the affective dictionaries used by ACT. For this purpose, we mapped Emoji2vec embedding to the affective space. Our framework can find emotional change during messaging and how a customer's reaction is changed accordingly.
summary: During online chats, body-language and vocal characteristics are not part of the communication mechanism making it challenging to facilitate an accurate interpretation of feelings, emotions, and attitudes. The use of emojis to express emotional feeling is an alternative approach in these types of communication. In this project, we focus on modeling a customer's emotion in an online messaging session with a chatbot. We use Affect Control Theory (ACT) to predict emotional change during the interaction. To let the customer use emojis, we also extend the affective dictionaries used by ACT. For this purpose, we mapped Emoji2vec embedding to the affective space. Our framework can find emotional change during messaging and how a customer's reaction is changed accordingly.
abstract_zh: 在在线聊天期间，肢体语言和声音特征不是沟通机制的一部分，这使得准确解释感受、情绪和态度具有挑战性。使用表情符号来表达情感是此类交流中的另一种方法。在这个项目中，我们专注于在与聊天机器人的在线消息会话中对客户的情绪进行建模。我们使用情感控制理论（ACT）来预测互动过程中的情绪变化。为了让客户使用表情符号，我们还扩展了 ACT 使用的情感词典。为此，我们将 Emoji2vec 嵌入映射到情感空间。我们的框架可以发现消息传递过程中的情绪变化以及客户的反应如何相应变化。

AI.tldr: 本研究利用emoji和词嵌入技术分析在线聊天中的情感变化
AI.motivation: 在线聊天中缺乏肢体语言和语音特征，导致情感解读困难，需寻找替代方法如emoji来表达情感
AI.method: 结合Affect Control Theory（ACT）和扩展的情感词典，将Emoji2vec嵌入到情感空间中，以建模客户情感变化
AI.result: 框架能够有效识别聊天过程中的情感变化及客户反应的动态调整
AI.conclusion: 该方法有助于揭示在线交流中的情感动态，提升聊天机器人的情感识别与响应能力

authors_text: Max Coenen,Tobias Schack,Dries Beyer,Christian Heipke,Michael Haist
title: Semi-Supervised Segmentation of Concrete Aggregate Using Consensus Regularisation and Prior Guidance
title_zh: 使用共识正则化和先验指导对混凝土骨料进行半监督分割
abstract: In order to leverage and profit from unlabelled data, semi-supervised frameworks for semantic segmentation based on consistency training have been proven to be powerful tools to significantly improve the performance of purely supervised segmentation learning. However, the consensus principle behind consistency training has at least one drawback, which we identify in this paper: imbalanced label distributions within the data. To overcome the limitations of standard consistency training, we propose a novel semi-supervised framework for semantic segmentation, introducing additional losses based on prior knowledge. Specifically, we propose a light-weight architecture consisting of a shared encoder and a main decoder, which is trained in a supervised manner. An auxiliary decoder is added as additional branch in order to make use of unlabelled data based on consensus training, and we add additional constraints derived from prior information on the class distribution and on auto-encoder regularisation. Experiments performed on our "concrete aggregate dataset" presented in this paper demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach, outperforming the segmentation results achieved by purely supervised segmentation and standard consistency training.
summary: In order to leverage and profit from unlabelled data, semi-supervised frameworks for semantic segmentation based on consistency training have been proven to be powerful tools to significantly improve the performance of purely supervised segmentation learning. However, the consensus principle behind consistency training has at least one drawback, which we identify in this paper: imbalanced label distributions within the data. To overcome the limitations of standard consistency training, we propose a novel semi-supervised framework for semantic segmentation, introducing additional losses based on prior knowledge. Specifically, we propose a light-weight architecture consisting of a shared encoder and a main decoder, which is trained in a supervised manner. An auxiliary decoder is added as additional branch in order to make use of unlabelled data based on consensus training, and we add additional constraints derived from prior information on the class distribution and on auto-encoder regularisation. Experiments performed on our "concrete aggregate dataset" presented in this paper demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach, outperforming the segmentation results achieved by purely supervised segmentation and standard consistency training.
abstract_zh: 为了利用未标记数据并从中获利，基于一致性训练的半监督语义分割框架已被证明是显着提高纯监督分割学习性能的强大工具。然而，一致性训练背后的共识原则至少有一个缺点，我们在本文中指出了这一点：数据内的标签分布不平衡。为了克服标准一致性训练的局限性，我们提出了一种新颖的半监督语义分割框架，引入了基于先验知识的额外损失。具体来说，我们提出了一种由共享编码器和主解码器组成的轻量级架构，该架构以监督方式进行训练。添加辅助解码器作为附加分支，以便利用基于共识训练的未标记数据，并且我们添加从有关类分布和自动编码器正则化的先验信息导出的附加约束。在本文提出的“具体聚合数据集”上进行的实验证明了所提出方法的有效性，优于纯粹监督分割和标准一致性训练所实现的分割结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于共识正则化和先验引导的半监督分割框架，用于混凝土集料分割。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督分割方法在标签分布不平衡时效果受限，需引入先验知识提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计轻量级共享编码器与主解码器进行监督训练，辅以共识训练的辅助解码器，并引入先验分布约束和自编码器正则化损失。
AI.result: 在本文发布的混凝土集料数据集上，分割性能优于纯监督方法和标准一致性训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合先验知识的半监督框架能有效缓解标签不平衡问题，提升混凝土集料分割精度。

authors_text: Yang An,Liang Zhang,Mao You,Xueqing Tian,Bo Jin,Xiaopeng Wei
title: MeSIN: Multilevel Selective and Interactive Network for Medication Recommendation
title_zh: MeSIN：用于药物推荐的多级选择性和交互网络
abstract: Recommending medications for patients using electronic health records (EHRs) is a crucial data mining task for an intelligent healthcare system. It can assist doctors in making clinical decisions more efficiently. However, the inherent complexity of the EHR data renders it as a challenging task: (1) Multilevel structures: the EHR data typically contains multilevel structures which are closely related with the decision-making pathways, e.g., laboratory results lead to disease diagnoses, and then contribute to the prescribed medications; (2) Multiple sequences interactions: multiple sequences in EHR data are usually closely correlated with each other; (3) Abundant noise: lots of task-unrelated features or noise information within EHR data generally result in suboptimal performance. To tackle the above challenges, we propose a multilevel selective and interactive network (MeSIN) for medication recommendation. Specifically, MeSIN is designed with three components. First, an attentional selective module (ASM) is applied to assign flexible attention scores to different medical codes embeddings by their relevance to the recommended medications in every admission. Second, we incorporate a novel interactive long-short term memory network (InLSTM) to reinforce the interactions of multilevel medical sequences in EHR data with the help of the calibrated memory-augmented cell and an enhanced input gate. Finally, we employ a global selective fusion module (GSFM) to infuse the multi-sourced information embeddings into final patient representations for medications recommendation. To validate our method, extensive experiments have been conducted on a real-world clinical dataset. The results demonstrate a consistent superiority of our framework over several baselines and testify the effectiveness of our proposed approach.
summary: Recommending medications for patients using electronic health records (EHRs) is a crucial data mining task for an intelligent healthcare system. It can assist doctors in making clinical decisions more efficiently. However, the inherent complexity of the EHR data renders it as a challenging task: (1) Multilevel structures: the EHR data typically contains multilevel structures which are closely related with the decision-making pathways, e.g., laboratory results lead to disease diagnoses, and then contribute to the prescribed medications; (2) Multiple sequences interactions: multiple sequences in EHR data are usually closely correlated with each other; (3) Abundant noise: lots of task-unrelated features or noise information within EHR data generally result in suboptimal performance. To tackle the above challenges, we propose a multilevel selective and interactive network (MeSIN) for medication recommendation. Specifically, MeSIN is designed with three components. First, an attentional selective module (ASM) is applied to assign flexible attention scores to different medical codes embeddings by their relevance to the recommended medications in every admission. Second, we incorporate a novel interactive long-short term memory network (InLSTM) to reinforce the interactions of multilevel medical sequences in EHR data with the help of the calibrated memory-augmented cell and an enhanced input gate. Finally, we employ a global selective fusion module (GSFM) to infuse the multi-sourced information embeddings into final patient representations for medications recommendation. To validate our method, extensive experiments have been conducted on a real-world clinical dataset. The results demonstrate a consistent superiority of our framework over several baselines and testify the effectiveness of our proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 使用电子健康记录 (EHR) 为患者推荐药物是智能医疗系统的一项重要数据挖掘任务。它可以帮助医生更有效地做出临床决策。然而，EHR数据固有的复杂性使其成为一项具有挑战性的任务：（1）多层次结构：EHR数据通常包含与决策路径密切相关的多层次结构，例如实验室结果导致疾病诊断，然后有助于处方药物； (2)多序列交互：EHR数据中的多个序列通常彼此密切相关； (3) 大量噪声：EHR 数据中大量与任务无关的特征或噪声信息通常会导致性能不佳。为了应对上述挑战，我们提出了一个用于药物推荐的多级选择性和交互网络（MeSIN）。具体来说，MeSIN 的设计由三个组件组成。首先，应用注意力选择性模块（ASM）根据不同医疗代码嵌入与每次入院推荐药物的相关性，为不同的医疗代码嵌入分配灵活的注意力分数。其次，我们结合了一种新颖的交互式长期短期记忆网络（InLSTM），借助校准的记忆增强单元和增强的输入门来加强 EHR 数据中多级医疗序列的相互作用。最后，我们采用全局选择性融合模块（GSFM）将多源信息嵌入注入最终的患者表示中以进行药物推荐。为了验证我们的方法，我们在真实世界的临床数据集上进行了广泛的实验。结果证明了我们的框架相对于多个基线的一致优越性，并证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MeSIN网络，通过处理电子健康记录（EHRs）的多级结构、序列交互和噪声问题，实现更精准的药物推荐。
AI.motivation: EHR数据存在多级结构关联、多序列交互及噪声干扰，导致传统方法在药物推荐任务中表现不足。
AI.method: 设计包含注意力选择模块（ASM）、交互式LSTM（InLSTM）和全局选择融合模块（GSFM）的MeSIN框架，分别处理特征选择、序列交互建模和多源信息融合。
AI.result: 在真实临床数据集上的实验表明，MeSIN在多个评估指标上优于现有基线方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: MeSIN通过多层级模块设计有效解决了EHR数据的复杂性问题，为智能医疗中的药物推荐提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出MeSIN网络，通过处理电子健康记录（EHRs）的多级结构、序列交互和噪声问题，实现更精准的药物推荐。
ai_content.motivation: EHR数据存在多级结构关联、多序列交互及噪声干扰，导致传统方法在药物推荐任务中表现不足。
ai_content.method: 设计包含注意力选择模块（ASM）、交互式LSTM（InLSTM）和全局选择融合模块（GSFM）的MeSIN框架，分别处理特征选择、序列交互建模和多源信息融合。
ai_content.result: 在真实临床数据集上的实验表明，MeSIN在多个评估指标上优于现有基线方法，验证了其有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: MeSIN通过多层级模块设计有效解决了EHR数据的复杂性问题，为智能医疗中的药物推荐提供了新思路。

search_text: MeSIN: Multilevel Selective and Interactive Network for Medication Recommendation MeSIN：用于药物推荐的多级选择性和交互网络 Recommending medications for patients using electronic health records (EHRs) is a crucial data mining task for an intelligent healthcare system. It can assist doctors in making clinical decisions more efficiently. However, the inherent complexity of the EHR data renders it as a challenging task: (1) Multilevel structures: the EHR data typically contains multilevel structures which are closely related with the decision-making pathways, e.g., laboratory results lead to disease diagnoses, and then contribute to the prescribed medications; (2) Multiple sequences interactions: multiple sequences in EHR data are usually closely correlated with each other; (3) Abundant noise: lots of task-unrelated features or noise information within EHR data generally result in suboptimal performance. To tackle the above challenges, we propose a multilevel selective and interactive network (MeSIN) for medication recommendation. Specifically, MeSIN is designed with three components. First, an attentional selective module (ASM) is applied to assign flexible attention scores to different medical codes embeddings by their relevance to the recommended medications in every admission. Second, we incorporate a novel interactive long-short term memory network (InLSTM) to reinforce the interactions of multilevel medical sequences in EHR data with the help of the calibrated memory-augmented cell and an enhanced input gate. Finally, we employ a global selective fusion module (GSFM) to infuse the multi-sourced information embeddings into final patient representations for medications recommendation. To validate our method, extensive experiments have been conducted on a real-world clinical dataset. The results demonstrate a consistent superiority of our framework over several baselines and testify the effectiveness of our proposed approach. 使用电子健康记录 (EHR) 为患者推荐药物是智能医疗系统的一项重要数据挖掘任务。它可以帮助医生更有效地做出临床决策。然而，EHR数据固有的复杂性使其成为一项具有挑战性的任务：（1）多层次结构：EHR数据通常包含与决策路径密切相关的多层次结构，例如实验室结果导致疾病诊断，然后有助于处方药物； (2)多序列交互：EHR数据中的多个序列通常彼此密切相关； (3) 大量噪声：EHR 数据中大量与任务无关的特征或噪声信息通常会导致性能不佳。为了应对上述挑战，我们提出了一个用于药物推荐的多级选择性和交互网络（MeSIN）。具体来说，MeSIN 的设计由三个组件组成。首先，应用注意力选择性模块（ASM）根据不同医疗代码嵌入与每次入院推荐药物的相关性，为不同的医疗代码嵌入分配灵活的注意力分数。其次，我们结合了一种新颖的交互式长期短期记忆网络（InLSTM），借助校准的记忆增强单元和增强的输入门来加强 EHR 数据中多级医疗序列的相互作用。最后，我们采用全局选择性融合模块（GSFM）将多源信息嵌入注入最终的患者表示中以进行药物推荐。为了验证我们的方法，我们在真实世界的临床数据集上进行了广泛的实验。结果证明了我们的框架相对于多个基线的一致优越性，并证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出MeSIN网络，通过处理电子健康记录（EHRs）的多级结构、序列交互和噪声问题，实现更精准的药物推荐。 Yang An,Liang Zhang,Mao You,Xueqing Tian,Bo Jin,Xiaopeng Wei cs.AI,cs.IR,cs.LG

authors_text: Alejandro Barrera,Jorge Beltrán,Carlos Guindel,Jose Antonio Iglesias,Fernando García
title: Cycle and Semantic Consistent Adversarial Domain Adaptation for Reducing Simulation-to-Real Domain Shift in LiDAR Bird's Eye View
title_zh: 循环和语义一致的对抗域适应，用于减少激光雷达鸟瞰图中的模拟到真实域的偏移
comment: Submitted to IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC2021)
comments: Submitted to IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC2021)
abstract: The performance of object detection methods based on LiDAR information is heavily impacted by the availability of training data, usually limited to certain laser devices. As a result, the use of synthetic data is becoming popular when training neural network models, as both sensor specifications and driving scenarios can be generated ad-hoc. However, bridging the gap between virtual and real environments is still an open challenge, as current simulators cannot completely mimic real LiDAR operation. To tackle this issue, domain adaptation strategies are usually applied, obtaining remarkable results on vehicle detection when applied to range view (RV) and bird's eye view (BEV) projections while failing for smaller road agents. In this paper, we present a BEV domain adaptation method based on CycleGAN that uses prior semantic classification in order to preserve the information of small objects of interest during the domain adaptation process. The quality of the generated BEVs has been evaluated using a state-of-the-art 3D object detection framework at KITTI 3D Object Detection Benchmark. The obtained results show the advantages of the proposed method over the existing alternatives.
summary: The performance of object detection methods based on LiDAR information is heavily impacted by the availability of training data, usually limited to certain laser devices. As a result, the use of synthetic data is becoming popular when training neural network models, as both sensor specifications and driving scenarios can be generated ad-hoc. However, bridging the gap between virtual and real environments is still an open challenge, as current simulators cannot completely mimic real LiDAR operation. To tackle this issue, domain adaptation strategies are usually applied, obtaining remarkable results on vehicle detection when applied to range view (RV) and bird's eye view (BEV) projections while failing for smaller road agents. In this paper, we present a BEV domain adaptation method based on CycleGAN that uses prior semantic classification in order to preserve the information of small objects of interest during the domain adaptation process. The quality of the generated BEVs has been evaluated using a state-of-the-art 3D object detection framework at KITTI 3D Object Detection Benchmark. The obtained results show the advantages of the proposed method over the existing alternatives.
abstract_zh: 基于激光雷达信息的物体检测方法的性能很大程度上受到训练数据可用性的影响，通常仅限于某些激光设备。因此，在训练神经网络模型时，合成数据的使用变得越来越流行，因为传感器规格和驾驶场景都可以临时生成。然而，弥合虚拟和真实环境之间的差距仍然是一个开放的挑战，因为当前的模拟器无法完全模拟真实的激光雷达操作。为了解决这个问题，通常采用域适应策略，当应用于范围视图（RV）和鸟瞰图（BEV）投影时，在车辆检测方面获得了显着的结果，而对于较小的道路代理则失败了。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 CycleGAN 的 BEV 域自适应方法，该方法使用先验语义分类，以便在域自适应过程中保留感兴趣的小目标的信息。生成的 BEV 的质量已使用 KITTI 3D 对象检测基准中最先进的 3D 对象检测框架进行了评估。获得的结果显示了所提出的方法相对于现有替代方法的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CycleGAN的BEV领域适应方法，结合语义分类以保留小目标信息，减少仿真到真实环境的LiDAR领域偏移。
AI.motivation: 现有领域适应方法在车辆检测有效但对小交通参与者效果差，需解决仿真与真实LiDAR数据间的领域差异问题。
AI.method: 采用CycleGAN框架，引入先验语义分类作为约束，确保领域适应过程中小目标信息不丢失。
AI.result: 在KITTI 3D检测基准中，生成BEV质量优于现有方法，尤其在小型目标检测上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过语义一致性约束有效保留小目标信息，为仿真到真实领域的LiDAR适应提供新思路。

authors_text: Minh H. Vu,Gabriella Norman,Tufve Nyholm,Tommy Löfstedt
title: A Data-Adaptive Loss Function for Incomplete Data and Incremental Learning in Semantic Image Segmentation
title_zh: 语义图像分割中不完整数据和增量学习的数据自适应损失函数
abstract: In the last years, deep learning has dramatically improved the performances in a variety of medical image analysis applications. Among different types of deep learning models, convolutional neural networks have been among the most successful and they have been used in many applications in medical imaging. Training deep convolutional neural networks often requires large amounts of image data to generalize well to new unseen images. It is often time-consuming and expensive to collect large amounts of data in the medical image domain due to expensive imaging systems, and the need for experts to manually make ground truth annotations. A potential problem arises if new structures are added when a decision support system is already deployed and in use. Since the field of radiation therapy is constantly developing, the new structures would also have to be covered by the decision support system. In the present work, we propose a novel loss function, that adapts to the available data in order to utilize all available data, even when some have missing annotations. We demonstrate that the proposed loss function also works well in an incremental learning setting, where it can automatically incorporate new structures as they appear. Experiments on a large in-house data set show that the proposed method performs on par with baseline models, while greatly reducing the training time.
summary: In the last years, deep learning has dramatically improved the performances in a variety of medical image analysis applications. Among different types of deep learning models, convolutional neural networks have been among the most successful and they have been used in many applications in medical imaging. Training deep convolutional neural networks often requires large amounts of image data to generalize well to new unseen images. It is often time-consuming and expensive to collect large amounts of data in the medical image domain due to expensive imaging systems, and the need for experts to manually make ground truth annotations. A potential problem arises if new structures are added when a decision support system is already deployed and in use. Since the field of radiation therapy is constantly developing, the new structures would also have to be covered by the decision support system. In the present work, we propose a novel loss function, that adapts to the available data in order to utilize all available data, even when some have missing annotations. We demonstrate that the proposed loss function also works well in an incremental learning setting, where it can automatically incorporate new structures as they appear. Experiments on a large in-house data set show that the proposed method performs on par with baseline models, while greatly reducing the training time.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，深度学习极大地提高了各种医学图像分析应用的性能。在不同类型的深度学习模型中，卷积神经网络是最成功的模型之一，并且已被用于医学成像的许多应用中。训练深度卷积神经网络通常需要大量图像数据才能很好地推广到新的未见过的图像。由于成像系统昂贵，并且需要专家手动进行地面实况注释，因此在医学图像领域收集大量数据通常既耗时又昂贵。如果在决策支持系统已经部署和使用时添加新结构，则会出现潜在问题。由于放射治疗领域在不断发展，新的结构也必须被决策支持系统覆盖。在目前的工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的损失函数，它可以适应可用的数据，以便利用所有可用的数据，即使有些数据缺少注释。我们证明，所提出的损失函数在增量学习环境中也能很好地工作，它可以在新结构出现时自动合并它们。在大型内部数据集上的实验表明，所提出的方法的性能与基线模型相当，同时大大减少了训练时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应损失函数，用于处理语义图像分割中的不完整数据和增量学习问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像数据获取成本高且标注困难，而现有系统在新增结构时需重新训练，亟需高效处理不完整数据和增量学习的模型。
AI.method: 设计一种数据自适应损失函数，通过利用部分标注数据并自动整合新结构，实现对不完整数据和增量学习的有效处理。
AI.result: 在大型医疗数据集上，该方法性能与基线模型相当，但显著减少了训练时间。
AI.conclusion: 提出的损失函数能有效应对不完整数据和增量学习挑战，为医疗图像分割提供高效解决方案。

It is often time-consuming and expensive to collect large amounts of data in the medical image domain due to expensive imaging systems, and the need for experts to manually make ground truth annotations. A potential problem arises if new structures are added when a decision support system is already deployed and in use. Since the field of radiation therapy is constantly developing, the new structures would also have to be covered by the decision support system. In the present work, we propose a novel loss function, that adapts to the available data in order to utilize all available data, even when some have missing annotations. We demonstrate that the proposed loss function also works well in an incremental learning setting, where it can automatically incorporate new structures as they appear. Experiments on a large in-house data set show that the proposed method performs on par with baseline models, while greatly reducing the training time. 在过去的几年里，深度学习极大地提高了各种医学图像分析应用的性能。在不同类型的深度学习模型中，卷积神经网络是最成功的模型之一，并且已被用于医学成像的许多应用中。训练深度卷积神经网络通常需要大量图像数据才能很好地推广到新的未见过的图像。由于成像系统昂贵，并且需要专家手动进行地面实况注释，因此在医学图像领域收集大量数据通常既耗时又昂贵。如果在决策支持系统已经部署和使用时添加新结构，则会出现潜在问题。由于放射治疗领域在不断发展，新的结构也必须被决策支持系统覆盖。在目前的工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的损失函数，它可以适应可用的数据，以便利用所有可用的数据，即使有些数据缺少注释。我们证明，所提出的损失函数在增量学习环境中也能很好地工作，它可以在新结构出现时自动合并它们。在大型内部数据集上的实验表明，所提出的方法的性能与基线模型相当，同时大大减少了训练时间。 本文提出一种自适应损失函数，用于处理语义图像分割中的不完整数据和增量学习问题。 Minh H. Vu,Gabriella Norman,Tufve Nyholm,Tommy Löfstedt eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Sambit Mohapatra,Senthil Yogamani,Heinrich Gotzig,Stefan Milz,Patrick Mader
title: BEVDetNet: Bird's Eye View LiDAR Point Cloud based Real-time 3D Object Detection for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: BEVDetNet：基于鸟瞰 LiDAR 点云的自动驾驶实时 3D 物体检测
comment: Accepted for Oral Presentation at IEEE Intelligent Transportation Systems Conference (ITSC) 2021
comments: Accepted for Oral Presentation at IEEE Intelligent Transportation Systems Conference (ITSC) 2021
abstract: 3D object detection based on LiDAR point clouds is a crucial module in autonomous driving particularly for long range sensing. Most of the research is focused on achieving higher accuracy and these models are not optimized for deployment on embedded systems from the perspective of latency and power efficiency. For high speed driving scenarios, latency is a crucial parameter as it provides more time to react to dangerous situations. Typically a voxel or point-cloud based 3D convolution approach is utilized for this module. Firstly, they are inefficient on embedded platforms as they are not suitable for efficient parallelization. Secondly, they have a variable runtime due to level of sparsity of the scene which is against the determinism needed in a safety system. In this work, we aim to develop a very low latency algorithm with fixed runtime. We propose a novel semantic segmentation architecture as a single unified model for object center detection using key points, box predictions and orientation prediction using binned classification in a simpler Bird's Eye View (BEV) 2D representation. The proposed architecture can be trivially extended to include semantic segmentation classes like road without any additional computation. The proposed model has a latency of 4 ms on the embedded Nvidia Xavier platform. The model is 5X faster than other top accuracy models with a minimal accuracy degradation of 2% in Average Precision at IoU=0.5 on KITTI dataset.
