abstract_zh: 基于 LiDAR 点云的 3D 物体检测是自动驾驶的关键模块，特别是对于远程传感。大多数研究都集中在实现更高的准确性，并且从延迟和功率效率的角度来看，这些模型并未针对在嵌入式系统上的部署进行优化。对于高速驾驶场景，延迟是一个至关重要的参数，因为它提供了更多时间对危险情况做出反应。该模块通常采用基于体素或点云的 3D 卷积方法。首先，它们在嵌入式平台上效率低下，因为它们不适合高效的并行化。其次，由于场景的稀疏程度，它们的运行时间是可变的，这违背了安全系统所需的确定性。在这项工作中，我们的目标是开发一种具有固定运行时间的极低延迟算法。我们提出了一种新颖的语义分割架构，作为使用关键点、框预测和方向预测的单一统一模型，在更简单的鸟瞰图 (BEV) 2D 表示中使用分箱分类来进行对象中心检测。所提出的架构可以轻松扩展以包括语义分割类（例如道路），而无需任何额外的计算。所提出的模型在嵌入式 Nvidia Xavier 平台上的延迟为 4 毫秒。该模型比其他高精度模型快 5 倍，在 KITTI 数据集上 IoU=0.5 时，平均精度的精度下降最小为 2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BEVDetNet，一种基于鸟瞰图（BEV）的实时3D目标检测算法，用于自动驾驶中的LiDAR点云处理。
AI.motivation: 现有3D目标检测模型精度高但未优化嵌入式系统的延迟和能效，且运行时间不固定，难以满足自动驾驶安全需求。
AI.method: 采用BEV 2D表示，结合关键点检测、框预测和分箱分类实现统一模型，可扩展语义分割功能，无需额外计算。
AI.result: 在NVIDIA Xavier平台实现4ms延迟，比顶级模型快5倍，KITTI数据集上平均精度仅下降2%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持精度的前提下显著降低延迟，满足自动驾驶实时性需求，适用于嵌入式部署。

search_text: BEVDetNet: Bird's Eye View LiDAR Point Cloud based Real-time 3D Object Detection for Autonomous Driving BEVDetNet：基于鸟瞰 LiDAR 点云的自动驾驶实时 3D 物体检测 3D object detection based on LiDAR point clouds is a crucial module in autonomous driving particularly for long range sensing. Most of the research is focused on achieving higher accuracy and these models are not optimized for deployment on embedded systems from the perspective of latency and power efficiency. For high speed driving scenarios, latency is a crucial parameter as it provides more time to react to dangerous situations. Typically a voxel or point-cloud based 3D convolution approach is utilized for this module. Firstly, they are inefficient on embedded platforms as they are not suitable for efficient parallelization. Secondly, they have a variable runtime due to level of sparsity of the scene which is against the determinism needed in a safety system. In this work, we aim to develop a very low latency algorithm with fixed runtime. We propose a novel semantic segmentation architecture as a single unified model for object center detection using key points, box predictions and orientation prediction using binned classification in a simpler Bird's Eye View (BEV) 2D representation. The proposed architecture can be trivially extended to include semantic segmentation classes like road without any additional computation. The proposed model has a latency of 4 ms on the embedded Nvidia Xavier platform. The model is 5X faster than other top accuracy models with a minimal accuracy degradation of 2% in Average Precision at IoU=0.5 on KITTI dataset. 基于 LiDAR 点云的 3D 物体检测是自动驾驶的关键模块，特别是对于远程传感。大多数研究都集中在实现更高的准确性，并且从延迟和功率效率的角度来看，这些模型并未针对在嵌入式系统上的部署进行优化。对于高速驾驶场景，延迟是一个至关重要的参数，因为它提供了更多时间对危险情况做出反应。该模块通常采用基于体素或点云的 3D 卷积方法。首先，它们在嵌入式平台上效率低下，因为它们不适合高效的并行化。其次，由于场景的稀疏程度，它们的运行时间是可变的，这违背了安全系统所需的确定性。在这项工作中，我们的目标是开发一种具有固定运行时间的极低延迟算法。我们提出了一种新颖的语义分割架构，作为使用关键点、框预测和方向预测的单一统一模型，在更简单的鸟瞰图 (BEV) 2D 表示中使用分箱分类来进行对象中心检测。所提出的架构可以轻松扩展以包括语义分割类（例如道路），而无需任何额外的计算。所提出的模型在嵌入式 Nvidia Xavier 平台上的延迟为 4 毫秒。该模型比其他高精度模型快 5 倍，在 KITTI 数据集上 IoU=0.5 时，平均精度的精度下降最小为 2%。 本文提出BEVDetNet，一种基于鸟瞰图（BEV）的实时3D目标检测算法，用于自动驾驶中的LiDAR点云处理。 Sambit Mohapatra,Senthil Yogamani,Heinrich Gotzig,Stefan Milz,Patrick Mader cs.CV

authors_text: Joseph de Vilmarest,Olivier Wintenberger
title: Viking: Variational Bayesian Variance Tracking
title_zh: Viking：变分贝叶斯方差跟踪
abstract: We consider the problem of time series forecasting in an adaptive setting. We focus on the inference of state-space models under unknown and potentially time-varying noise variances. We introduce an augmented model in which the variances are represented as auxiliary gaussian latent variables in a tracking mode. As variances are nonnegative, a transformation is chosen and applied to these latent variables. The inference relies on the online variational Bayesian methodology, which consists in minimizing a Kullback-Leibler divergence at each time step. We observe that the minimum of the Kullback-Leibler divergence is an extension of the Kalman filter taking into account the variance uncertainty. We design a novel algorithm, named Viking, using these optimal recursive updates. For auxiliary latent variables, we use second-order bounds whose optimum admit closed-form solutions. Experiments on synthetic data show that Viking behaves well and is robust to misspecification.
summary: We consider the problem of time series forecasting in an adaptive setting. We focus on the inference of state-space models under unknown and potentially time-varying noise variances. We introduce an augmented model in which the variances are represented as auxiliary gaussian latent variables in a tracking mode. As variances are nonnegative, a transformation is chosen and applied to these latent variables. The inference relies on the online variational Bayesian methodology, which consists in minimizing a Kullback-Leibler divergence at each time step. We observe that the minimum of the Kullback-Leibler divergence is an extension of the Kalman filter taking into account the variance uncertainty. We design a novel algorithm, named Viking, using these optimal recursive updates. For auxiliary latent variables, we use second-order bounds whose optimum admit closed-form solutions. Experiments on synthetic data show that Viking behaves well and is robust to misspecification.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑自适应环境中的时间序列预测问题。我们专注于未知且可能随时间变化的噪声方差下状态空间模型的推理。我们引入了一种增强模型，其中方差在跟踪模式下表示为辅助高斯潜变量。由于方差是非负的，因此选择变换并将其应用于这些潜在变量。该推理依赖于在线变分贝叶斯方法，该方法旨在最小化每个时间步的 Kullback-Leibler 散度。我们观察到 Kullback-Leibler 散度的最小值是考虑方差不确定性的卡尔曼滤波器的扩展。我们使用这些最佳递归更新设计了一种新颖的算法，名为 Viking。对于辅助潜变量，我们使用二阶界限，其最佳承认封闭式解。对合成数据的实验表明，Viking 表现良好，并且对错误指定具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Viking的算法，用于在噪声方差未知且可能随时间变化的情况下进行时间序列预测。
AI.motivation: 传统时间序列预测方法通常假设噪声方差已知或固定，但实际应用中噪声方差可能随时间变化，导致模型预测不准确。
AI.method: 通过引入辅助高斯潜在变量表示方差，并采用变换处理非负性约束，结合在线变分贝叶斯方法最小化KL散度，推导出扩展卡尔曼滤波器形式的递归更新公式，最终设计出Viking算法。
AI.result: 在合成数据集上的实验表明，Viking算法在噪声方差不确定情况下具有良好的预测性能和对模型误设的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Viking算法通过有效建模噪声方差的时变特性，提升了自适应时间序列预测的准确性和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Sara I. Garcia
title: Meta-learning for skin cancer detection using Deep Learning Techniques
title_zh: 使用深度学习技术进行皮肤癌检测的元学习
abstract: This study focuses on automatic skin cancer detection using a Meta-learning approach for dermoscopic images. The aim of this study is to explore the benefits of the generalization of the knowledge extracted from non-medical data in the classification performance of medical data and the impact of the distribution shift problem within limited data by using a simple class and distribution balancer algorithm. In this study, a small sample of a combined dataset from 3 different sources was used to fine-tune a ResNet model pre-trained on non-medical data. The results show an increase in performance on detecting melanoma, malignant (skin cancer), and benign moles with the prior knowledge obtained from images of everyday objects from the ImageNet dataset by 20 points. These findings suggest that features from non-medical images can be used towards the classification of skin moles and that the distribution of the data affects the performance of the model.
summary: This study focuses on automatic skin cancer detection using a Meta-learning approach for dermoscopic images. The aim of this study is to explore the benefits of the generalization of the knowledge extracted from non-medical data in the classification performance of medical data and the impact of the distribution shift problem within limited data by using a simple class and distribution balancer algorithm. In this study, a small sample of a combined dataset from 3 different sources was used to fine-tune a ResNet model pre-trained on non-medical data. The results show an increase in performance on detecting melanoma, malignant (skin cancer), and benign moles with the prior knowledge obtained from images of everyday objects from the ImageNet dataset by 20 points. These findings suggest that features from non-medical images can be used towards the classification of skin moles and that the distribution of the data affects the performance of the model.
abstract_zh: 这项研究的重点是使用皮肤镜图像的元学习方法自动检测皮肤癌。本研究的目的是通过使用简单的类和分布平衡器算法，探讨从非医学数据中提取的知识的泛化对医学数据分类性能的好处以及有限数据内分布转移问题的影响。在本研究中，使用来自 3 个不同来源的组合数据集的小样本来微调基于非医学数据预训练的 ResNet 模型。结果显示，利用从 ImageNet 数据集的日常物体图像中获得的先验知识，检测黑色素瘤、恶性（皮肤癌）和良性痣的性能提高了 20 个百分点。这些发现表明，非医学图像的特征可用于皮肤痣的分类，并且数据的分布会影响模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用元学习方法结合非医学数据预训练模型，提升皮肤癌检测在有限医学数据下的分类性能。
AI.motivation: 医学数据量有限且分布不均导致模型泛化能力不足，探索非医学数据中的通用特征是否能提升皮肤癌分类准确率。
AI.method: 整合三个来源的医学数据集，使用ImageNet预训练的ResNet模型，通过简单类别和分布平衡算法进行微调。
AI.result: 利用非医学图像特征使黑色素瘤和良性痣的检测准确率提升20个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 非医学图像特征可有效辅助皮肤病变分类，数据分布差异显著影响模型性能。

search_text: Meta-learning for skin cancer detection using Deep Learning Techniques 使用深度学习技术进行皮肤癌检测的元学习 This study focuses on automatic skin cancer detection using a Meta-learning approach for dermoscopic images. The aim of this study is to explore the benefits of the generalization of the knowledge extracted from non-medical data in the classification performance of medical data and the impact of the distribution shift problem within limited data by using a simple class and distribution balancer algorithm. In this study, a small sample of a combined dataset from 3 different sources was used to fine-tune a ResNet model pre-trained on non-medical data. The results show an increase in performance on detecting melanoma, malignant (skin cancer), and benign moles with the prior knowledge obtained from images of everyday objects from the ImageNet dataset by 20 points. These findings suggest that features from non-medical images can be used towards the classification of skin moles and that the distribution of the data affects the performance of the model. 这项研究的重点是使用皮肤镜图像的元学习方法自动检测皮肤癌。本研究的目的是通过使用简单的类和分布平衡器算法，探讨从非医学数据中提取的知识的泛化对医学数据分类性能的好处以及有限数据内分布转移问题的影响。在本研究中，使用来自 3 个不同来源的组合数据集的小样本来微调基于非医学数据预训练的 ResNet 模型。结果显示，利用从 ImageNet 数据集的日常物体图像中获得的先验知识，检测黑色素瘤、恶性（皮肤癌）和良性痣的性能提高了 20 个百分点。这些发现表明，非医学图像的特征可用于皮肤痣的分类，并且数据的分布会影响模型的性能。 本文研究利用元学习方法结合非医学数据预训练模型，提升皮肤癌检测在有限医学数据下的分类性能。 Sara I. Garcia cs.CV

authors_text: Ankit Laddha,Shivam Gautam,Stefan Palombo,Shreyash Pandey,Carlos Vallespi-Gonzalez
title: MVFuseNet: Improving End-to-End Object Detection and Motion Forecasting through Multi-View Fusion of LiDAR Data
title_zh: MVFuseNet：通过 LiDAR 数据的多视图融合改进端到端对象检测和运动预测
comment: Published at CVPR 2021 Workshop on Autonomous Driving
comments: Published at CVPR 2021 Workshop on Autonomous Driving
abstract: In this work, we propose \textit{MVFuseNet}, a novel end-to-end method for joint object detection and motion forecasting from a temporal sequence of LiDAR data. Most existing methods operate in a single view by projecting data in either range view (RV) or bird's eye view (BEV). In contrast, we propose a method that effectively utilizes both RV and BEV for spatio-temporal feature learning as part of a temporal fusion network as well as for multi-scale feature learning in the backbone network. Further, we propose a novel sequential fusion approach that effectively utilizes multiple views in the temporal fusion network. We show the benefits of our multi-view approach for the tasks of detection and motion forecasting on two large-scale self-driving data sets, achieving state-of-the-art results. Furthermore, we show that MVFusenet scales well to large operating ranges while maintaining real-time performance.
summary: In this work, we propose \textit{MVFuseNet}, a novel end-to-end method for joint object detection and motion forecasting from a temporal sequence of LiDAR data. Most existing methods operate in a single view by projecting data in either range view (RV) or bird's eye view (BEV). In contrast, we propose a method that effectively utilizes both RV and BEV for spatio-temporal feature learning as part of a temporal fusion network as well as for multi-scale feature learning in the backbone network. Further, we propose a novel sequential fusion approach that effectively utilizes multiple views in the temporal fusion network. We show the benefits of our multi-view approach for the tasks of detection and motion forecasting on two large-scale self-driving data sets, achieving state-of-the-art results. Furthermore, we show that MVFusenet scales well to large operating ranges while maintaining real-time performance.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 \textit{MVFuseNet}，这是一种新颖的端到端方法，用于根据 LiDAR 数据的时间序列进行联合对象检测和运动预测。大多数现有方法通过在范围视图 (RV) 或鸟瞰视图 (BEV) 中投影数据来在单一视图中进行操作。相比之下，我们提出了一种有效利用 RV 和 BEV 进行时空特征学习的方法，作为时间融合网络的一部分，以及骨干网络中的多尺度特征学习。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的顺序融合方法，可以有效地利用时间融合网络中的多个视图。我们展示了多视图方法在两个大规模自动驾驶数据集上的检测和运动预测任务中的优势，取得了最先进的结果。此外，我们还表明 MVFusenet 可以很好地扩展到大操作范围，同时保持实时性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MVFuseNet，一种通过融合多视角LiDAR数据的端到端方法，用于联合目标检测和运动预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常仅使用单视角（如距离视图或鸟瞰图），限制了时空特征学习能力，而多视角融合可提升检测与预测性能。
AI.method: 设计时序融合网络同时利用距离视图（RV）和鸟瞰图（BEV），结合多尺度特征学习，并提出序列融合方法以有效整合多视角信息。
AI.result: 在两个大规模自动驾驶数据集上达到最先进水平，且在大范围操作下保持实时性能。
AI.conclusion: 多视角融合显著提升目标检测与运动预测效果，MVFuseNet在扩展性与实时性上表现优异。

authors_text: Lu Huang,Jingyu Sun,Yufeng Tang,Junfeng Hou,Jinkun Chen,Jun Zhang,Zejun Ma
title: HMM-Free Encoder Pre-Training for Streaming RNN Transducer
title_zh: 用于流式 RNN 传感器的无 HMM 编码器预训练
abstract: This work describes an encoder pre-training procedure using frame-wise label to improve the training of streaming recurrent neural network transducer (RNN-T) model. Streaming RNN-T trained from scratch usually performs worse than non-streaming RNN-T. Although it is common to address this issue through pre-training components of RNN-T with other criteria or frame-wise alignment guidance, the alignment is not easily available in end-to-end manner. In this work, frame-wise alignment, used to pre-train streaming RNN-T's encoder, is generated without using a HMM-based system. Therefore an all-neural framework equipping HMM-free encoder pre-training is constructed. This is achieved by expanding the spikes of CTC model to their left/right blank frames, and two expanding strategies are proposed. To our best knowledge, this is the first work to simulate HMM-based frame-wise label using CTC model for pre-training. Experiments conducted on LibriSpeech and MLS English tasks show the proposed pre-training procedure, compared with random initialization, reduces the WER by relatively 5%~11% and the emission latency by 60 ms. Besides, the method is lexicon-free, so it is friendly to new languages without manually designed lexicon.
summary: This work describes an encoder pre-training procedure using frame-wise label to improve the training of streaming recurrent neural network transducer (RNN-T) model. Streaming RNN-T trained from scratch usually performs worse than non-streaming RNN-T. Although it is common to address this issue through pre-training components of RNN-T with other criteria or frame-wise alignment guidance, the alignment is not easily available in end-to-end manner. In this work, frame-wise alignment, used to pre-train streaming RNN-T's encoder, is generated without using a HMM-based system. Therefore an all-neural framework equipping HMM-free encoder pre-training is constructed. This is achieved by expanding the spikes of CTC model to their left/right blank frames, and two expanding strategies are proposed. To our best knowledge, this is the first work to simulate HMM-based frame-wise label using CTC model for pre-training. Experiments conducted on LibriSpeech and MLS English tasks show the proposed pre-training procedure, compared with random initialization, reduces the WER by relatively 5%~11% and the emission latency by 60 ms. Besides, the method is lexicon-free, so it is friendly to new languages without manually designed lexicon.
abstract_zh: 这项工作描述了一种使用逐帧标签的编码器预训练过程，以改进流循环神经网络传感器（RNN-T）模型的训练。从头开始训练的流式 RNN-T 通常比非流式 RNN-T 表现更差。尽管通常通过 RNN-T 的预训练组件与其他标准或逐帧对齐指导来解决这个问题，但以端到端的方式实现对齐并不容易。在这项工作中，用于预训练流式 RNN-T 编码器的逐帧对齐是在不使用基于 HMM 的系统的情况下生成的。因此，构建了一个配备无 HMM 编码器预训练的全神经框架。这是通过将 CTC 模型的尖峰扩展到其左/右空白帧来实现的，并提出了两种扩展策略。据我们所知，这是第一个使用 CTC 模型来模拟基于 HMM 的逐帧标签进行预训练的工作。在 LibriSpeech 和 MLS 英语任务上进行的实验表明，与随机初始化相比，所提出的预训练过程将 WER 降低了 5%~11%，发射延迟降低了 60 ms。此外，该方法是无词典的，因此对新语言友好，无需手动设计词典。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需HMM系统的流式RNN-T编码器预训练方法，通过CTC模型生成帧级对齐标签以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 流式RNN-T从零训练效果差，传统预训练依赖HMM系统难以端到端实现，而HMM系统存在复杂性和词典依赖问题。
AI.method: 通过扩展CTC模型的尖峰至左右空白帧生成帧级对齐标签，提出两种扩展策略实现无HMM的编码器预训练。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech和MLS数据集上，相较随机初始化使词错误率降低5-11%，发射延迟减少60ms，且无需词典支持新语言。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次通过CTC模拟HMM标签实现端到端预训练，有效提升流式RNN-T性能，适用于无词典的新语言场景。

Although it is common to address this issue through pre-training components of RNN-T with other criteria or frame-wise alignment guidance, the alignment is not easily available in end-to-end manner. In this work, frame-wise alignment, used to pre-train streaming RNN-T's encoder, is generated without using a HMM-based system. Therefore an all-neural framework equipping HMM-free encoder pre-training is constructed. This is achieved by expanding the spikes of CTC model to their left/right blank frames, and two expanding strategies are proposed. To our best knowledge, this is the first work to simulate HMM-based frame-wise label using CTC model for pre-training. Experiments conducted on LibriSpeech and MLS English tasks show the proposed pre-training procedure, compared with random initialization, reduces the WER by relatively 5%~11% and the emission latency by 60 ms. Besides, the method is lexicon-free, so it is friendly to new languages without manually designed lexicon. 这项工作描述了一种使用逐帧标签的编码器预训练过程，以改进流循环神经网络传感器（RNN-T）模型的训练。从头开始训练的流式 RNN-T 通常比非流式 RNN-T 表现更差。尽管通常通过 RNN-T 的预训练组件与其他标准或逐帧对齐指导来解决这个问题，但以端到端的方式实现对齐并不容易。在这项工作中，用于预训练流式 RNN-T 编码器的逐帧对齐是在不使用基于 HMM 的系统的情况下生成的。因此，构建了一个配备无 HMM 编码器预训练的全神经框架。这是通过将 CTC 模型的尖峰扩展到其左/右空白帧来实现的，并提出了两种扩展策略。据我们所知，这是第一个使用 CTC 模型来模拟基于 HMM 的逐帧标签进行预训练的工作。在 LibriSpeech 和 MLS 英语任务上进行的实验表明，与随机初始化相比，所提出的预训练过程将 WER 降低了 5%~11%，发射延迟降低了 60 ms。此外，该方法是无词典的，因此对新语言友好，无需手动设计词典。 本文提出一种无需HMM系统的流式RNN-T编码器预训练方法，通过CTC模型生成帧级对齐标签以提升模型性能。 Lu Huang,Jingyu Sun,Yufeng Tang,Junfeng Hou,Jinkun Chen,Jun Zhang,Zejun Ma eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.SD

authors_text: Markus Winklberger,Christoph Kralovec,Martin Schagerl
title: Development of Aircraft Spoiler Demonstrators for Cost-Efficient Investigations of SHM Technologies under Quasi-Realistic Loading Conditions
title_zh: 开发飞机扰流板演示器，以便在准真实负载条件下对 SHM 技术进行经济高效的研究
abstract: An idealized 1:2 scale demonstrator and a numerical parameter optimization algorithm are proposed to closely reproduce the deformation shape and, thus, spatial strain directions of a real aerodynamically loaded civil aircraft spoiler using only four concentrated loads. Cost-efficient experimental studies on demonstrators of increasing complexity are required to transfer knowledge from coupons to full-scale structures and to build up confidence in novel structural health monitoring (SHM) technologies. Especially for testing novel sensor systems that depend on or are affected by mechanical strains, e.g., strain-based SHM methods, it is essential that the considered lab-scale structures reflect the strain states of the real structure at operational loading conditions. Finite element simulations with detailed models were performed for static strength analysis and for comparison to experimental measurements. The simulated and measured deformations and spatial strain directions of the idealized demonstrator correlated well with the numerical results of the real aircraft spoiler. Thus, using the developed idealized demonstrator, strain-based SHM systems can be tested under conditions that reflect operational aerodynamic pressure loads, while the test effort and costs are significantly reduced. Furthermore, the presented loading optimization algorithm can be easily adapted to mimic other pressure loads in plate-like structures to reproduce specific structural conditions.
summary: An idealized 1:2 scale demonstrator and a numerical parameter optimization algorithm are proposed to closely reproduce the deformation shape and, thus, spatial strain directions of a real aerodynamically loaded civil aircraft spoiler using only four concentrated loads. Cost-efficient experimental studies on demonstrators of increasing complexity are required to transfer knowledge from coupons to full-scale structures and to build up confidence in novel structural health monitoring (SHM) technologies. Especially for testing novel sensor systems that depend on or are affected by mechanical strains, e.g., strain-based SHM methods, it is essential that the considered lab-scale structures reflect the strain states of the real structure at operational loading conditions. Finite element simulations with detailed models were performed for static strength analysis and for comparison to experimental measurements. The simulated and measured deformations and spatial strain directions of the idealized demonstrator correlated well with the numerical results of the real aircraft spoiler. Thus, using the developed idealized demonstrator, strain-based SHM systems can be tested under conditions that reflect operational aerodynamic pressure loads, while the test effort and costs are significantly reduced. Furthermore, the presented loading optimization algorithm can be easily adapted to mimic other pressure loads in plate-like structures to reproduce specific structural conditions.
abstract_zh: 提出了理想化的 1:2 比例演示器和数值参数优化算法，仅使用四个集中载荷即可精确再现实际气动加载民用飞机扰流板的变形形状和空间应变方向。需要对日益复杂的示范物进行具有成本效益的实验研究，以将知识从优惠券转移到全尺寸结构，并建立对新型结构健康监测（SHM）技术的信心。特别是对于测试依赖于机械应变或受机械应变影响的新型传感器系统（例如基于应变的 SHM 方法）而言，所考虑的实验室规模结构必须反映实际结构在工作负载条件下的应变状态。使用详细模型进行有限元模拟，以进行静态强度分析并与实验测量进行比较。理想演示器的模拟和测量变形以及空间应变方向与真实飞机扰流板的数值结果密切相关。因此，使用开发的理想化演示器，可以在反映操作气动压力负载的条件下测试基于应变的 SHM 系统，同时显着减少测试工作量和成本。此外，所提出的载荷优化算法可以很容易地适应模拟板状结构中的其他压力载荷，以重现特定的结构条件。

AI.tldr: 开发1:2比例的飞机扰流板演示器及优化算法，以低成本模拟真实气动载荷下的应变状态，用于结构健康监测技术的实验研究。
AI.motivation: 需通过低成本实验验证新型结构健康监测（SHM）技术，尤其需确保实验室结构能反映真实操作条件下的应变状态，以降低全尺寸测试成本并提升技术可靠性。
AI.method: 设计理想化缩比演示器并结合数值参数优化算法，仅用四个集中载荷模拟真实扰流板的变形和应变方向，通过有限元仿真与实验数据对比验证准确性。
AI.result: 演示器的仿真与实测变形及应变方向与真实飞机扰流板数值结果高度吻合，证实该方法可有效模拟气动压力载荷下的应变状态。
AI.conclusion: 该演示器及优化算法显著降低测试成本，为应变基SHM系统的验证提供可行方案，且算法可扩展至其他板状结构的特定载荷模拟。
